stem: Telemetry from the step-down unit flags a 68-year-old with atrial fibrillation who received IV diltiazem 10 mg push at 08:10. At 08:25 vitals are BP 88/54 mmHg, HR 124 bpm, SpO₂ 91% on 2 L nasal cannula. Labs drawn at 07:55 show K⁺ 4.1 mEq/L, creatinine 1.4 mg/dL. He reports dizziness when attempting to sit up.
stemZh: 降階病房遙測在 08:10 為一名 68 歲心房顫動病人靜脈推注 diltiazem 10 mg。08:25 生命徵象為 BP 88/54 mmHg、HR 124 bpm、2 L 鼻導管下 SpO₂ 91%。07:55 抽血顯示 K⁺ 4.1 mEq/L、creatinine 1.4 mg/dL。病人試著坐起時主訴頭暈。
optionA: Increase the oxygen flow to 6 L/min without notifying the provider
optionB: Place the patient supine with legs elevated and notify the provider about hypotension after calcium channel blockade
optionC: Administer a second 10 mg IV diltiazem bolus to slow the ventricular response
optionD: Hold scheduled metoprolol and encourage oral fluid bolus of 1 L over 10 minutes
explanationZh: 依據 AACN 成人遙測監護相關臨床指引，非二線抗心律不整藥後若出現收縮壓顯著下降與姿勢性症狀，應先處置血流動力學不穩並盡速與醫師溝通調整速率或藥物。正解透過平躺抬腳促進靜脈回流並回報低血壓，符合鈣離子阻斷劑過度抑制血管張力後的優先處置。選項A在未評估循環與醫囑下提高氧流，可能掩蓋組織灌流問題。選項C重複推注會加重低血壓。選項D快速口服大量液體對心衰竭風險病人不安全，且自行停 beta blocker 缺乏個別化評估。

A.en: Raising oxygen alone does not address vasodilation-related hypotension after diltiazem and bypasses provider input when perfusion is threatened.
A.zh: 單純提高氧氣無法處理 diltiazem 相關血管擴張造成的低灌流，且未經醫師評估可能延誤處置。

B.en: Supine positioning with leg elevation supports venous return while the team reassesses need to adjust rate-control therapy after a calcium channel blocker bolus.
B.zh: 平躺抬腳有助靜脈回流，並在鈣離子阻斷劑推注後讓團隊重新評估心率控制策略。

C.en: Repeat diltiazem risks compounding AV nodal suppression and worsening hypotension when BP is already 88/54 mmHg.
C.zh: 在 BP 已 88/54 mmHg 時再推 diltiazem 可能加深房室結抑制並惡化低血壓。

D.en: A rapid oral fluid challenge is not universally safe after hypotension with rate-control therapy and holding beta blockers without assessment can be harmful.
D.zh: 快速口服補液並非所有情境安全，且未評估即停 metoprolol 可能帶來反彈或控制不佳。

usTwDifference: 美國常以 diltiazem 靜注做室率控制；台灣臨床商品名與健保給付條件不同，RN 靜脈推注權限亦依院內規範與醫囑系統而異。

stem: A home infusion nurse reviews a PICC line dressing placed yesterday for vancomycin 1 g IV every 12 hours. The insertion site is warm, with 2 cm of erythema and scant tan drainage. Temp 38.1°C, WBC 14.2 ×10³/µL, lactate 1.1 mmol/L. The next dose is due in 40 minutes.
stemZh: 居家輸液護理師檢視昨日更換敷料的 PICC，病人使用 vancomycin 1 g IV q12h。穿刺處發熱，紅斑 2 cm 並有少量褐色分泌物。體溫 38.1°C，WBC 14.2 ×10³/µL，lactate 1.1 mmol/L。下一劑在 40 分鐘後到期。
optionA: Scrub the hub for 15 seconds, then administer vancomycin as scheduled through the PICC
optionB: Draw paired peripheral and central blood cultures, hold the dose, and notify the provider about suspected catheter-related infection
optionC: Apply topical mupirocin ointment under the dressing and continue the infusion plan
optionD: Flush the line with 10 mL normal saline and increase vancomycin frequency to every 8 hours
explanationZh: INS 輸液治療實務標準強調懷疑導管相關感染時應先取得培養並由醫師評估是否暫停經導管給藥。正解同步安排周邊與中央血液培養並暫停劑量，避免在可能菌血症時持續將微生物沖入循環。選項A忽略局部感染徵象仍給藥。選項D自行更改抗生素頻次超出護理職權且缺乏濃度監測。選項C局部抗生素無法取代全身評估與培養導向治療。

A.en: Infusing through a possibly infected central line without cultures can seed the bloodstream during bacteremia risk.
A.zh: 在疑似感染導管未培養前仍經該路徑輸注，可能使菌血症風險惡化。

B.en: Paired cultures clarify catheter involvement and holding the dose pending provider direction aligns with infection surveillance priorities.
B.zh: 配對培養有助判斷導管相關性，暫停劑量等待醫師指示符合感染處置優先順序。

C.en: Topical antibiotic under a dressing does not treat deep-line colonization and may obscure drainage assessment.
C.zh: 敷料下局部抗生素無法處理深部導管菌落，也可能遮蔽分泌物變化。

D.en: Empiric interval tightening without trough monitoring or orders can precipitate nephrotoxicity and is not nurse-initiated therapy.
D.zh: 未監測 trough 即自行縮短給藥間隔，腎毒性風險上升且非護理可獨立決定。

usTwDifference: 台灣居家用抗生素常受健保事前審查與特約藥局配送限制；美國居家輸液公司模式較常見，RN 是否可抽血培養依各州執業範圍與醫囑而定。

stem: In the oncology clinic, a 54-year-old on cisplatin-based chemotherapy presents for cycle 2. Weight 72 kg, urine output 380 mL over the prior 8 hours. Labs today: Mg²⁺ 1.6 mg/dL, K⁺ 3.2 mEq/L, creatinine 1.1 mg/dL. IV ondansetron 8 mg was given 30 minutes ago for nausea.
stemZh: 腫瘤門診一名 54 歲病人接受含 cisplatin 化療第 2 週期，體重 72 kg，過去 8 小時尿量 380 mL。今日檢驗 Mg²⁺ 1.6 mg/dL、K⁺ 3.2 mEq/L、creatinine 1.1 mg/dL。30 分鐘前因嘔心靜注 ondansetron 8 mg。
optionA: Notify the provider about symptomatic hypokalemia and hypomagnesemia before additional antiemetics
optionB: Administer potassium chloride 40 mEq IV push to rapidly correct the K⁺ of 3.2 mEq/L
optionC: Encourage oral magnesium oxide tablets without reporting the Mg²⁺ of 1.6 mg/dL
optionD: Review cisplatin hydration orders and clarify whether magnesium replacement is planned
optionE: Document neuro checks and cardiac rhythm monitoring needs given electrolyte derangements
explanationZh: Oncology Nursing Society 與化療相關腎鎂流失指引均提醒 cisplatin 後低鎂會加重低鉀與心律風險，需醫師主導的靜脈補充與監測計畫。正解聚焦通報電解質異常、確認水化與鎂補充醫囑、並記錄神經與心律監測需求。選項B鉀鹽靜脈推注禁忌。選項C自行口服鎂劑未通報可能延誤嚴重缺乏處置。

A.en: Alerting the prescriber links antiemetic choices to QT-risking electrolytes rather than stacking serotonin antagonists blindly.
A.zh: 先告知醫師可把止吐藥決策與電解質相關 QT 風險連結，而非盲目追加止吐劑。

B.en: IV potassium bolus can cause fatal arrhythmia and is never appropriate as an undiluted push.
B.zh: 氯化鉀靜脈推注可致命，絕不可未稀釋快速給予。

C.en: Oral magnesium replacement alone may be insufficient with cisplatin-induced renal wasting and bypasses provider-directed IV therapy.
C.zh: 單靠口服鎂在腎性流失情境常不足，且繞過醫師的靜脈補充計畫。

D.en: Confirming hydration and planned magnesium repletion aligns chemotherapy toxicity mitigation with ordered supportive care.
D.zh: 確認水化與預定鎂補充能把化療毒性支持措施與醫囑對齊。

E.en: Electrolyte shifts warrant documentation of assessment frequency for cramps, confusion, and ECG changes per unit protocol.
E.zh: 電解質異常需依單位規範記錄抽筋、意識與心電圖變化的評估頻率。

stem: Emergency triage hands off a 29-year-old with anaphylaxis after bee sting. Epinephrine 0.3 mg IM was given in the lateral thigh at 14:02. At 14:12 BP is 96/60 mmHg, HR 118 bpm, SpO₂ 94% on nonrebreather. Bilateral wheezes persist; hives cover the trunk.
stemZh: 急診檢傷交班一名 29 歲蜂螫後全身過敏反應病人，14:02 於大腿外側肌肉注射 epinephrine 0.3 mg。14:12 BP 96/60 mmHg、HR 118 bpm、非再吸入面罩下 SpO₂ 94%。雙側喘鳴持續，軀幹仍有蕁麻疹。
optionA: Wait 30 more minutes because a second epinephrine dose cannot be given within 15 minutes
optionB: Prepare a repeat IM epinephrine dose per protocol and coordinate provider evaluation for refractory bronchospasm
optionC: Switch to oral diphenhydramine only and remove oxygen to prevent dependence
optionD: Start an epinephrine infusion at 2 mcg/min without weighing the patient
explanationZh: 依據 WAO 與急症過敏處置常與 CDC 急救教育資源一致的重點，持續呼吸道症狀與循環仍受威脅時可重複肌肉注射腎上腺素並尋求進一步處置。正解安排第二劑並連結醫師評估符合難治性支氣管痙攣流程。選項A延誤可能惡化。選項C口服抗組織胺無法取代腎上腺素。選項D未經醫師與精密滴定即啟動輸注風險高。

A.en: Ongoing wheeze and borderline perfusion after IM epinephrine warrants reassessment sooner than a prolonged passive wait.
A.zh: 肌肉注射後仍喘鳴且灌流偏低，不應長時間被動等待。

B.en: Repeat IM dosing is standard for persistent anaphylaxis symptoms while advanced airway or infusion therapy is arranged.
B.zh: 症狀持續時重複肌肉注射是常規，同時準備更高階處置。

C.en: Oral antihistamines do not reverse airway edema quickly and removing oxygen ignores hypoxemia at 94%.
C.zh: 口服抗組織胺無法快速逆轉氣道水腫，移除氧氣也忽略 SpO₂ 94%。

D.en: IV epinephrine infusions require careful titration and orders; starting at an arbitrary rate risks hypertension and arrhythmia.
D.zh: 靜脈腎上腺素滴注需醫囑與滴定，任意起始速率可能高血壓與心律不整。

usTwDifference: 美國校園與公共場所常備自動注射器品牌與劑量教育普及；台灣急診外取得自動注射器較少，RN 在院外活動是否可施打須依機構政策。

stem: On the medical floor, warfarin 5 mg PO is scheduled for 18:00. INR this morning is 3.9, platelets 180 ×10³/µL, no active bleeding, hemoglobin stable at 11.2 g/dL compared with yesterday. The patient ate 60% of lunch and denies headache.
stemZh: 內科病房 warfarin 5 mg PO 預定 18:00。今早 INR 3.9、血小板 180 ×10³/µL，無活動性出血，血色素 11.2 g/dL 與昨日相比穩定。病人午餐進食 60% 並否認頭痛。
optionA: Administer the warfarin because the dose is already on the MAR
optionB: Hold the dose and contact the provider about supratherapeutic INR without bleeding
optionC: Crush the tablet in applesauce to improve absorption
optionD: Give vitamin K 10 mg IV now without an order
explanationZh: 參照 ACCP 抗凝管理原則在護理可及範圍的應用，INR 明顯超標且無出血時應先暫停給藥並請醫師調整。正解暫停並聯絡醫師避免進一步升高出血風險。選項A忽略實驗室警訊。選項C磨粉改變劑型與吸收且不必要。選項D未醫囑給維生素K 可能過度逆轉凝血。

A.en: A supratherapeutic INR of 3.9 requires prescriber input before continuing the scheduled anticoagulant dose.
A.zh: INR 3.9 屬超治療範圍，需醫師指示再決定是否給藥。

B.en: Holding warfarin pending review prevents further INR elevation while bleeding risk is reassessed.
B.zh: 暫停 warfarin 等待覆核可避免 INR 再上升並重新評估出血風險。

C.en: Crushing warfarin alters pharmacy handling expectations and does not correct an elevated INR.
C.zh: 磨粉改變藥物處理規範，也無法解決 INR 過高。

D.en: IV vitamin K is not nurse-prescribed therapy and may overshoot reversal when bleeding is absent.
D.zh: 靜脈維生素K 非護理可自開醫囑，無出血時可能過度逆轉。

usTwDifference: 台灣門診追蹤 INR 的頻率與藥師介入模式因醫院而異；美國社區抗凝診所較普及，但護理暫停劑量並聯絡醫師的原則相近。

stem: A postsurgical patient has PCA morphine 1 mg demand dose with 6-minute lockout. Respirations are 8/min, SpO₂ 89% on room air, BP 110/70 mmHg. Pupils are pinpoint and the patient is difficult to arouse. Last bolus recorded 25 minutes ago.
stemZh: 術後病人使用 PCA morphine，每次需求劑量 1 mg、鎖定時間 6 分鐘。呼吸 8 次/分，室氣下 SpO₂ 89%，BP 110/70 mmHg。瞳孔針尖樣且不易叫醒。記錄顯示上次 bolus 在 25 分鐘前。
optionA: Stop the PCA infusion after ensuring airway patency and notify the anesthesia or pain team
optionB: Coach slower breathing while leaving the PCA running unchanged
optionC: Administer naloxone 0.4 mg IV push undiluted as a rapid sequence
optionD: Apply supplemental oxygen and prepare capnography if available per unit policy
optionE: Document sedation score, respiratory rate trend, and neurologic checks q15 minutes after intervention
explanationZh: ASPEN 與術後疼痛多模式照護文件均強調鴉片類呼吸抑制需立即降低暴露並支持換氣。正解在確保氣道後停用 PCA、給氧並依政策監測呼末二氧化碳，且密集記錄意識與呼吸。選項B延誤處置。選項C大劑量快速 naloxone 可能急性戒斷與疼痛危象，需小量滴定並依醫囑。

A.en: Pausing the PCA removes ongoing opioid delivery when hypoventilation and pinpoint pupils suggest toxicity.
A.zh: 低換氣與針尖瞳孔提示毒性時，暫停 PCA 可停止持續鴉片暴露。

B.en: Verbal coaching cannot overcome obtundation from opioid-induced respiratory depression.
B.zh: 病人已意識抑制，僅口頭指導呼吸無法逆轉鴉片呼吸抑制。

C.en: A full 0.4 mg rapid IV push may abruptly reverse analgesia and cause pulmonary edema or severe pain crisis in the postoperative setting.
C.zh: 快速大量 naloxone 可能驟然失去止痛並引發劇痛或血流動力學波動。

D.en: Oxygen treats hypoxemia while capnography detects rising CO₂ when sedation masks rate changes.
D.zh: 氧氣改善低氧，呼末二氧化碳可在鎮靜掩蓋下偵測二氧化碳上升。

E.en: Frequent documentation after reversal or dose adjustment supports safe monitoring intervals for rebound sedation.
E.zh: 介入後密集記錄可掌握反彈性鎮靜的監測節奏。

usTwDifference: 台灣術後 PCA 常由麻醉科設定參數；美國部分州允許 RN 在協議下調整鎖定時間，台灣多需醫師重新開立。

stem: Dialysis day for a 61-year-old ends with receipt of epoetin alfa 4,000 units subcutaneous per protocol. Within 20 minutes he reports facial tightness and itching without wheeze. BP 142/88 mmHg, HR 92 bpm, SpO₂ 97% on room air.
stemZh: 一名 61 歲病人透析日依規範接受 epoetin alfa 4000 units 皮下注射。20 分鐘內主訴臉部緊繃與搔癢，無喘鳴。BP 142/88 mmHg、HR 92 bpm、室氣 SpO₂ 97%。
optionA: Reassure only and send the patient home because vitals are stable
optionB: Stop further epoetin administration, monitor closely, and notify the provider about possible hypersensitivity
optionC: Administer a second full dose to complete the weekly erythropoiesis plan
optionD: Apply a heating pad to the face to relieve tightness
explanationZh: KDIGO 貧血指引與藥典監測建議均提醒紅血球生成素製劑可出現過敏反應，即使初期生命徵象穩定。正解停止後續給藥、密切監測並通報醫師以決定抗組織胺或替代製劑。選項A忽略惡化可能。選項C重複劑量不當。選項D熱敷與過敏路徑無關。

A.en: Mild symptoms can escalate; stable vitals do not exclude evolving hypersensitivity to biologic agents.
A.zh: 症狀輕微仍可能惡化，生命徵象穩定不能排除生物製劑過敏進展。

B.en: Halting further exposure and reporting allows evaluation for antihistamines, observation, or switching erythropoiesis-stimulating formulations.
B.zh: 停止再暴露並回報，才能評估抗組織胺、觀察或更換紅血球生成素劑型。

C.en: Doubling exposure after facial symptoms risks anaphylaxis.
C.zh: 臉部症狀後再加劑量可能導致過敏性休克。

D.en: Heat application does not address mast-cell mediated symptoms and may distract from monitoring airway changes.
D.zh: 熱敷無法處理肥大細胞媒介反應，也可能轉移對氣道變化的注意。

usTwDifference: 台灣透析單位對 ESA 的品牌轉換常受健保價格與招標影響；美國生物相似藥選擇較多，過敏時替代策略需醫師決定。

stem: The pharmacist messages that gentamicin 120 mg IV was prepared in 100 mL normal saline to infuse over 30 minutes. The nurse discovers a duplicate order also listing gentamicin 120 mg IV push. Scheduled start is in 10 minutes. Baseline creatinine is 0.9 mg/dL.
stemZh: 藥師通知 gentamicin 120 mg IV 已以 100 mL 生理食鹽水稀釋預備，預定 30 分鐘滴完。護理師發現另有一張重複醫囑寫 gentamicin 120 mg IV push。預定開始時間在 10 分鐘後。基準 creatinine 0.9 mg/dL。
optionA: Give the IV push route first to achieve peak levels faster
optionB: Clarify and resolve the duplicate orders with pharmacy and the prescriber before administration
optionC: Split the dose into two 60 mg IV pushes 15 minutes apart
optionD: Administer the diluted infusion twice as fast to save time
explanationZh: IDSA 氨基醣苷使用建議與院內藥事安全規範均要求確認給藥途徑與輸注時間以避免腎毒性與錯誤暴露。正解在給藥前釐清重複醫囑並統一安全途徑。選項A靜脈推注氨基醣苷屬高風險。選項C自行拆分劑量改變藥動學。選項D縮短輸注時間可能增加毒性。

A.en: IV push aminoglycosides create high serum peaks abruptly and increase ototoxicity risk compared with controlled infusion.
A.zh: 氨基醣苷靜脈推注會驟升血中濃度，耳毒性風險高於可控輸注。

B.en: Resolving duplicate orders prevents double dosing and aligns nursing administration with pharmacy preparation.
B.zh: 釐清重複醫囑可避免雙倍劑量，並使給藥與調劑一致。

C.en: Empiric dose splitting alters prescribed pharmacokinetics and can cause subtherapeutic or toxic intervals.
C.zh: 自行拆分劑量改變處方藥動學，可能治療不足或毒性間隔異常。

D.en: Shortening infusion time contradicts the prepared dilution plan and may elevate free drug exposure.
D.zh: 縮短輸注與已調劑稀釋計畫相悖，可能提高游離藥物暴露。

stem: A 48-year-old with heart failure reports three loose stools today after starting furosemide 40 mg PO twice daily yesterday. BP 102/66 mmHg, HR 96 bpm, lung crackles decreased. Labs: Na⁺ 132 mEq/L, K⁺ 3.0 mEq/L, BUN 28 mg/dL, creatinine 1.0 mg/dL.
stemZh: 48 歲心衰竭病人昨日開始 furosemide 40 mg PO BID，今日解三次稀便。BP 102/66 mmHg、HR 96 bpm，肺部囉音減少。檢驗 Na⁺ 132 mEq/L、K⁺ 3.0 mEq/L、BUN 28 mg/dL、creatinine 1.0 mg/dL。
optionA: Notify the provider about hypokalemia and loop diuretic-related losses
optionB: Encourage the patient to double the furosemide dose to clear excess fluid faster
optionC: Assess orthostatic vitals and intake/output for 24 hours
optionD: Administer potassium chloride 20 mEq in 50 mL D5W IV over 5 minutes without an order
optionE: Teach dietary potassium sources and review current medication list for additive hypokalemia risk
explanationZh: HFSA 心衰竭指引相關護理衛教重點提醒利尿劑可促排鉀並需監測電解質。正解通報低鉀、評估姿位血壓與出入量、並衛教鉀攝取與合併用藥風險。選項B自行加量可能惡化低血壓與電解質失衡。選項D快速靜脈鉀不安全。

A.en: A K⁺ of 3.0 mEq/L with new loop diuretic therapy merits prescriber-directed replacement planning.
A.zh: 新使用袢利尿劑且 K⁺ 3.0 mEq/L，需要醫師規劃補鉀。

B.en: Unauthorized dose escalation worsens electrolyte wasting and orthostasis when BP is already 102/66 mmHg.
B.zh: 未授權加劑量在 BP 已偏低時會加重電解質流失與姿位性低血壓。

C.en: Orthostatic measurements and I/O clarify volume status after diuresis improves crackles.
C.zh: 姿位血壓與出入量可釐清囉音改善後的容積狀態。

D.en: Rapid IV potassium violates safety standards for infusion concentration and duration.
D.zh: 短時間高濃度靜脈鉀違反安全輸注規範。

E.en: Diet teaching and medication review address synergistic hypokalemia from diuretics plus other agents.
E.zh: 飲食與用藥檢視可找出利尿劑與其他藥物加成的低鉀風險。

usTwDifference: 台灣門診常見院外自費電解質檢驗較少；美國部分 HF 診間有護理師主導電話調利尿劑，台灣多需醫師回診調整。

stem: Night shift report includes a patient on heparin infusion at 1,400 units/hour after a pulmonary embolism. PTT at 03:00 is 120 seconds, platelets 96 ×10³/µL yesterday versus 210 ×10³/µL four days ago. No mucosal bleeding; hemoglobin 10.4 g/dL.
stemZh: 夜班交班一名肺栓塞病人 heparin 輸注 1400 units/hour。03:00 PTT 120 秒，血小板昨日 96 ×10³/µL，四天前 210 ×10³/µL。無黏膜出血，血色素 10.4 g/dL。
optionA: Increase the infusion by 200 units/hour because the clot is life-threatening
optionB: Stop the heparin, notify the provider, and anticipate workup for heparin-induced thrombocytopenia
optionC: Give protamine 50 mg IV now without waiting for orders
optionD: Draw a repeat PTT in 6 hours while continuing the same rate
explanationZh: 參照 ASH 對 HIT 評估與處置摘要，肝素期間血小板下降超過一半需高度警覺並停止暴露。正解停肝素並通知醫師安排替代抗凝評估。選項A延長 PTT 時再加量增加出血。選項C未確認出血即給解劑不當。選項D忽略血小板趨勢。

A.en: Supratherapeutic PTT with falling platelets contradicts heparin escalation.
A.zh: PTT 過長且血小板下降，與再加速肝素相矛盾。

B.en: Stopping heparin when platelets fall by over 50% prompts diagnostic scoring and non-heparin anticoagulation planning.
B.zh: 血小板降幅超過一半時停肝素，才能進行評分與非肝素抗凝規劃。

C.en: Protamine reverses anticoagulation and is ordered for major bleeding or peri-procedural needs, not isolated lab abnormalities without a plan.
C.zh: 魚精蛋白用於重大出血或特定情境，需醫囑，不宜僅因實驗室異常自行給予。

D.en: Waiting six hours ignores thrombocytopenia progression that may worsen thrombotic risk in HIT.
D.zh: 等待六小時可能錯失 HIT 相關血小板持續下降與血栓風險。

usTwDifference: 台灣醫院對 HIT 抗體檢驗可及性與通報流程不一；美國常用 4T 分數與實驗室套餐，護理停藥通報原則相似。

stem: Outpatient teaching covers insulin glargine 22 units subcutaneous at 22:00 plus insulin lispro with meals. Fasting glucose logs average 52 mg/dL for three mornings. Bedtime snack is inconsistent. HbA1c 7.8%.
stemZh: 門診衛教：胰島素 glargine 22 units 22:00 皮下，餐時胰島素 lispro。連續三天早晨空腹血糖平均 52 mg/dL，睡前點心不固定。HbA1c 7.8%。
optionA: Tell the patient to skip breakfast insulin when fasting glucose is low
optionB: Instruct the patient to contact the provider promptly about recurrent fasting hypoglycemia on basal insulin
optionC: Advise increasing glargine by 4 units to improve the HbA1c
optionD: Recommend stopping all insulin until the next annual visit
explanationZh: ADA 糖尿病標準照護強調反覆低血糖需調整基礎胰島素並由醫師決定劑量。正解促使病人盡快聯絡醫師以檢視 glargine 與夜間進食。選項A可能導致餐後高血糖或規律混亂。選項C在低血糖趨勢下加基礎劑量危險。選項D驟停所有胰島素可能造成酮酸風險。

A.en: Selectively omitting prandial insulin without a full pattern review can produce erratic glycemic control.
A.zh: 未完整評估即跳過餐時胰島素會使血糖波動更難預測。

B.en: Repeated fasting values near 50 mg/dL warrant prescriber adjustment of basal dosing and meal planning.
B.zh: 連續清晨接近 50 mg/dL 需醫師調整基礎劑量與飲食計畫。

C.en: Raising glargine when mornings are hypoglycemic increases nocturnal neuroglycopenia risk.
C.zh: 清晨低血糖時再提高 glargine 會增加夜間神經低血糖風險。

D.en: Abrupt cessation of basal and bolus insulin is unsafe with established insulin requirement.
D.zh: 已依賴胰島素者突然全停不安全。

usTwDifference: 台灣胰島素筆針具部分需自費；美國藥局可常規提供衛教資源，但低血糖通報醫師的護理重點一致。

stem: ICU rounds note norepinephrine 12 mcg/min through a central line for septic shock. MAP has been 58 mmHg for 20 minutes despite 30 mL/kg crystalloid completed 2 hours ago. Lactate 3.4 mmol/L, urine output 15 mL/hour for 3 hours. ScvO₂ 62%.
stemZh: 加護病房查房：敗血性休克病人經中央靜脈輸注 norepinephrine 12 mcg/min。儘管 2 小時前已完成 30 mL/kg 晶體液，20 分鐘來 MAP 仍 58 mmHg。Lactate 3.4 mmol/L，3 小時尿量 15 mL/hour，ScvO₂ 62%。
optionA: Titrate norepinephrine per protocol or provider parameters to achieve target MAP
optionB: Stop vasopressors to avoid digital ischemia when urine output is low
optionC: Verify line patency, waveform, and extravasation checks before further titration
optionD: Give a 1 L bolus of 3% hypertonic saline through peripheral IV without orders
optionE: Communicate lactate, urine output, and MAP trends to the provider team for adjunct vasopressor decisions
explanationZh: SSC 敗血症國際指引支持在足夠輸液後以升壓藥維持灌注壓並記錄器官灌注指標。正解依參數調整去甲腎上腺素、確認管路安全、並整合乳酸與尿量趨勢給醫療團隊。選項B停升壓藥會惡化休克。選項D高張鹽水非第一線敗血症容量策略且需醫囑。

A.en: MAP below goal after fluids indicates need for vasopressor titration to restore organ perfusion pressure.
A.zh: 輸液後 MAP 仍低，需調升壓藥以恢復器官灌注壓。

B.en: Discontinuing pressors for oliguria would worsen hypotension rather than protect the kidneys in distributive shock.
B.zh: 因寡尿停用升壓藥會使低血壓惡化，無法保護腎臟。

C.en: Central line integrity checks prevent under-delivery of vasopressor during titration attempts.
C.zh: 確認中央管路可避免升壓藥滴定時輸注不足。

D.en: Hypertonic saline boluses are not standard sepsis resuscitation fluid and peripheral administration risks tissue injury.
D.zh: 高張鹽水非常規敗血症復甦液體，周邊給予也有組織損傷風險。

E.en: Sharing lactate and urine trends informs decisions about adding vasopressin or epinephrine.
E.zh: 分享乳酸與尿量趨勢有助是否加入 vasopressin 或 epinephrine 的決策。

usTwDifference: 台灣加護病房升壓藥滴定常由專責醫師下令範圍；美國部分機構授權 RN 在協議內調整 norepinephrine。

stem: A 35-week pregnant patient receives betamethasone 12 mg IM for fetal lung maturation at 14:00. At 18:00 she receives nifedipine 20 mg PO for tocolysis per order. BP 98/62 mmHg, HR 88 bpm, fetal heart rate category I.
stemZh: 妊娠 35 週病人 14:00 接受 betamethasone 12 mg IM 促胎肺成熟。18:00 依醫囑口服 nifedipine 20 mg 作宮縮抑制。BP 98/62 mmHg、HR 88 bpm，胎心率類別 I。
optionA: Hold future nifedipine doses without telling anyone because BP is below 100 systolic
optionB: Assess for orthostatic symptoms, reinforce side-lying rest, and report hypotension to the provider for dose review
optionC: Administer a second betamethasone dose immediately to strengthen fetal effect
optionD: Give IV magnesium sulfate 6 g bolus without an order to relax the uterus
explanationZh: ACOG 早產宮縮處置相關建議提醒鈣離子阻斷劑可能造成母體低血壓，需監測姿位症狀並由醫師調整。正解評估姿位性低血壓、衛教側臥休息並回報醫師。選項A自行停藥缺乏溝通。選項C重複類固醇需特定時程。選項D鎂鹽需醫囑與監測設備。

A.en: Silently holding antihypertensive tocolysis can allow breakthrough contractions without a documented plan.
A.zh: 未告知即停宮縮用藥可能使宮縮失控且無紀錄計畫。

B.en: Orthostatic assessment and provider notification align calcium channel blocker side effects with safe obstetric monitoring.
B.zh: 姿位評估與醫師聯繫能把鈣離子阻斷劑副作用與產科監測連結。

C.en: Betamethasone courses follow timed dosing; unsanctioned repeats increase maternal hyperglycemia risk.
C.zh: Betamethasone 需依時程，未授權重複增加母體高血糖風險。

D.en: Magnesium loading requires monitoring for toxicity and is not a nurse-initiated bolus for mild tocolysis.
D.zh: 鎂劑負荷需毒性監測，非護理可自開的輕度宮縮抑制手段。

usTwDifference: 台灣產科常使用 nifedipine 宮縮抑制但病房監測人力配置不同；美國 RN 對胎心率判讀訓練時數規範因州而異。

stem: A child weighing 18 kg is ordered cephalexin 450 mg PO q8h for cellulitis. The pharmacy sends 250 mg/5 mL suspension. The mother asks if she can mix the dose in formula to hide the taste.
stemZh: 一名 18 kg 兒童因蜂窩組織炎醫囑 cephalexin 450 mg PO q8h。藥局提供 250 mg/5 mL 口服懸浮液。母親詢問是否可把劑量混在配方奶中以掩蓋味道。
optionA: Approve mixing the full antibiotic volume in a full bottle consumed over 6 hours
optionB: Teach to measure the exact mL for 450 mg, give in a small amount consumed at once, and verify absorption with the pharmacist if masking is needed
optionC: Tell the mother to double the concentration by using half the water when reconstituting
optionD: Switch to adult capsules opened at the bedside without a new order
explanationZh: 依據 CDC 兒童抗生素完成療程衛教重點，懸浮液需精準量測並避免稀釋在大量奶液導致攝入不全。正解教導以小量立即服完並必要時諮詢藥師。選項A分次長時間喝奶可能吃不完有效劑量。選項C改變調劑濃度錯誤。選項D更改劑型需醫師處方。

A.en: Diluting into a full bottle risks incomplete ingestion if the child stops feeding early.
A.zh: 混入整瓶奶若未喝完會導致抗生素攝入不足。

B.en: Precise volume to deliver 450 mg and immediate consumption preserves pharmacokinetics; pharmacists can suggest flavoring options.
B.zh: 精準毫升數並一次服完可維持藥動學，藥師可提供調味建議。

C.en: Altering reconstitution volume deviates from pharmacy instructions and risks overdose.
C.zh: 改變調水體積違反調劑說明並可能過量。

D.en: Changing formulation strength requires a new order and child-appropriate dosing verification.
D.zh: 更換劑型需新醫囑與兒童劑量核對。

usTwDifference: 台灣兒科門診藥師調劑諮詢量能因醫院而異；美國零售藥局對口味混和指引較制式，但精準量測原則相同。

stem: While preparing a morning antibiotic, the nurse finds two vials labeled similarly: azithromycin 500 mg for IV infusion and aztreonam 1 g. The prescriber order reads azithromycin 500 mg IV daily. The barcode scan fails twice on the selected vial.
stemZh: 晨間準備抗生素時，護理師發現兩瓶標籤相似：azithromycin 500 mg 靜脈輸注用與 aztreonam 1 g。醫囑為 azithromycin 500 mg IV daily。所選瓶罐條碼掃描兩次失敗。
optionA: Manually type the override code because the drug name on the label matches the order
optionB: Stop, segregate the vials, involve pharmacy, and delay administration until barcode verification succeeds
optionC: Choose aztreonam because it covers gram-negative pathogens broadly
optionD: Dilute both drugs in the same bag to save a line
explanationZh: 依據 NCSBN 對護理用藥安全的強調與 ISMP 高警訊藥物管理精神，掃描失敗與外觀相似藥瓶並存時應停止給藥鏈並求助藥師。正解隔離藥瓶、聯繫藥劑並延後至可驗證為止。選項A手動覆寫增加錯誤。選項C替換藥物超出職權。選項D理化不相容與劑量錯誤風險極高。

A.en: Barcode overrides when look-alike vials are nearby bypass the last automated safeguard.
A.zh: 相似藥瓶在旁時覆寫條碼會繞過最後自動防呆。

B.en: Pharmacy reconciliation resolves scanner issues and confirms the correct macrolide before infusion.
B.zh: 藥師可解決掃描問題並確認正確巨環類再輸注。

C.en: Substituting aztreonam for azithromycin changes spectrum and requires a new prescription.
C.zh: 以 aztreonam 取代 azithromycin 改變抗菌範圍且需新處方。

D.en: Y-site compatibility is not assumed; co-mixing risks precipitation and wrong dosing.
D.zh: 不可假設可混注，共袋可能析出沉澱與劑量錯誤。

usTwDifference: 台灣醫院逐步導入床邊條碼但覆寫原因登錄規定不一；美國 Joint Commission 亦要求雙重核對，護理停給原則相近。

stem: A patient with HIV starts bictegravir-emtricitabine-tenofovir alafenamide daily. Three hours after the first dose he vomits entire pill fragments. CD4 is 210 cells/µL, viral load 42,000 copies/mL, creatinine 0.8 mg/dL.
stemZh: HIV 病人開始每日服用 bictegravir-emtricitabine-tenofovir alafenamide。首次劑量後 3 小時嘔出完整藥錠碎片。CD4 210 cells/µL、病毒量 42,000 copies/mL、creatinine 0.8 mg/dL。
optionA: Tell him to double the next dose tomorrow
optionB: Contact the HIV clinician or pharmacist for guidance on redosing after emesis within the absorption window
optionC: Crush the tablet and administer via NG tube without checking compatibility
optionD: Hold all antiretrovirals until the next clinic visit in 3 months
explanationZh: 依據 DHHS 抗反轉錄病毒指引對服藥依從與嘔吐後補服的原則，需依藥物半衰期與劑型諮詢專科。正解聯繫感染科或藥師決定是否補服。選項A自行加倍可能毒性。選項C破壞緩釋或複方劑型設計。選項D長期停藥造成抗藥性。

A.en: Unsupervised dose doubling of integrase-based single-tablet regimens risks drug toxicity and resistance selection patterns.
A.zh: 自行加倍整合酶單錠複方可能增加毒性並影響抗藥性篩選。

B.en: Specialist guidance determines whether vomiting within hours requires a repeat dose or next scheduled administration.
B.zh: 專科可判定數小時內嘔吐是否需補服或依下次排程。

C.en: Crushing co-formulated ART alters pharmacokinetics and may clog tubes without pharmacy verification.
C.zh: 磨碎複方 ART 改變藥動學且未經藥師確認可能堵管。

D.en: Three-month interruption with detectable viremia promotes resistance and immune decline.
D.zh: 在病毒量仍高時停藥三個月易產生抗藥並惡化免疫。

usTwDifference: 台灣免費提供抗 HIV 複方錠方案受公費計畫限制；美國處方常隨保險藥品目錄調整，但嘔吐後諮詢專科的原則相同。

stem: Prior to a scheduled colonoscopy, the order reads polyethylene glycol bowel prep with clear liquids. The patient also takes lisinopril 10 mg daily, metformin 1,000 mg BID, and apixaban 5 mg BID. Morning labs show glucose 142 mg/dL, creatinine 1.3 mg/dL, K⁺ 4.4 mEq/L.
stemZh: 預定大腸鏡前醫囑為聚乙二醇腸道準備並進清流質。病人平日服用 lisinopril 10 mg QD、metformin 1000 mg BID、apixaban 5 mg BID。晨間檢驗血糖 142 mg/dL、creatinine 1.3 mg/dL、K⁺ 4.4 mEq/L。
optionA: Clarify periprocedural hold instructions for metformin with the prescriber before the prep day
optionB: Encourage the patient to stop all clear liquids 12 hours before the prep to improve visibility
optionC: Confirm timing of the last apixaban dose relative to endoscopy bleeding-risk planning
optionD: Add sodium phosphate tablets to accelerate the prep without orders
optionE: Teach signs of hypovolemia during high-volume PEG prep and when to call the endoscopy team
explanationZh: 參照 ASGE 內視鏡前抗凝血與血糖藥物管理摘要，護理重點在核對停藥時程與病人脱水監測。正解確認 metformin 暫停與腎功能風險、確認 apixaban 最後服藥時間、並衛教腸道準備中低容積徵象。選項B清流質時間錯誤易致脱水與準備失敗。選項D磷酸鈉額外刺激無醫囑下不安全。

A.en: Metformin around contrast-free procedures still needs renal and hypoperfusion risk review tied to bowel prep fluid shifts.
A.zh: 即使無顯影劑，腸道準備的體液移動仍須依腎功能檢視 metformin 暫停。

B.en: Clear liquid diet timing follows unit instructions; premature restriction impairs hydration during PEG consumption.
B.zh: 清流質節點應依單位指引，過早限制會妨礙 PEG 服用期間水分補充。

C.en: DOAC timing before polypectomy risk procedures must align with multidisciplinary bleeding plans.
C.zh: 息肉切除等出血風險程序前，DOAC 停藥時點需與多專科止血計畫一致。

D.en: Additional phosphate laxatives without orders raise electrolyte catastrophe risk on top of PEG.
D.zh: 在 PEG 之外自行加磷酸鹽緩瀉劑，電解質失控風險大增。

E.en: Orthostasis and cramping during high-volume prep warrant scripted escalation pathways.
E.zh: 大量準備期出現姿位性低血壓與腹痛需有明確通報路徑。

usTwDifference: 台灣內視鏡前抗凝血橋接策略常由麻醉與消化科共識決定；美國門診常以藥師電話確認停藥，護理核對時程的責任類似。

stem: A burn unit patient receives IV hydromorphone PCA with a continuous basal rate of 0.2 mg/hour. Suddenly the pump alarms downstream occlusion; the forearm IV site is cool and blanched over 4 cm. BP 122/74 mmHg, HR 88 bpm, RR 16/min.
stemZh: 燒傷病房病人使用 IV hydromorphone PCA，基礎速率 0.2 mg/hour。幫浦突然下游阻塞警報；前臂靜脈處發涼且 4 cm 蒼白。BP 122/74 mmHg、HR 88 bpm、RR 16/min。
optionA: Reset the alarm and increase the basal rate to maintain analgesia
optionB: Stop the infusion, assess extravasation risk, notify the provider, and prepare new vascular access per protocol
optionC: Flush the line forcefully with 20 mL saline to clear the clot
optionD: Convert all analgesia to IM morphine at the same numeric dose
explanationZh: INS 標準指出高警訊鴉片類外滲可致組織壞死，需立即停止輸注並通報。正解停幫浦、評估外滲、依規範重建血管路徑。選項A忽略缺血皮膚徵象。選項C強力沖洗可能將藥物推入組織間隙。選項D肌肉劑量換算不等同且延誤處置。

A.en: Escalating delivery when the limb shows ischemic changes risks compartment injury from extravasated opioid.
A.zh: 肢體已缺血樣改變時再加量，可能使外滲鴉片類加重間室損傷。

B.en: Stopping the infusion contains local drug exposure while another line is secured for ordered analgesia.
B.zh: 停止輸注可局限局部藥物暴露，另建管路續行醫囑止痛。

C.en: Forceful flushing through a compromised cannula can hydraulically dissect tissue planes.
C.zh: 在可能受損導管強力沖洗可能將液體壓入組織間隙。

D.en: IM equianalgesic conversion requires pharmacy calculation and ignores the urgent vascular complication.
D.zh: 肌肉換算需藥師計算，也無法處理當下血管事件。

stem: Community health follow-up for latent tuberculosis includes isoniazid 300 mg PO daily and pyridoxine 50 mg PO daily. Two weeks later ALT rises from 28 U/L to 120 U/L; the patient denies jaundice but reports fatigue. INR 1.0, bilirubin 0.9 mg/dL.
stemZh: 潛伏結核社區追蹤：isoniazid 300 mg PO daily 與 pyridoxine 50 mg PO daily。兩週後 ALT 由 28 U/L 升至 120 U/L，病人否認黃疸但疲倦。INR 1.0、bilirubin 0.9 mg/dL。
optionA: Advise continuing isoniazid because bilirubin is normal
optionB: Hold isoniazid pending provider review of hepatotoxicity and repeat liver enzymes
optionC: Double pyridoxine to 100 mg to treat the ALT elevation
optionD: Add acetaminophen 1 g every 6 hours for fatigue
explanationZh: 依據 ATS/CDC 潛伏結核治療監測建議，肝轉氨酶顯著上升需暫停用藥並由醫師評估。正解暫停 isoniazid 並安排覆檢。選項A忽略藥物性肝炎早期。選項C維生素B6 不治療肝毒性。選項D額外肝代謝負擔可能惡化。

A.en: Normal bilirubin does not exclude isoniazid hepatitis when transaminases quadruple.
A.zh: 膽紅素正常不能排除 isoniazid 肝炎，轉氨酶已上升四倍。

B.en: Holding the drug prevents ongoing hepatocyte injury while labs are trended and alternatives considered.
B.zh: 停藥可避免持續肝細胞損傷並追蹤實驗室與替代方案。

C.en: Pyridoxine prevents neuropathy but does not correct drug-induced liver inflammation.
C.zh: Pyridoxine 預防神經病變，無法修正藥物性肝發炎。

D.en: Scheduled acetaminophen adds hepatic metabolism load during emerging transaminitis.
D.zh: 在轉氨酶上升期規律使用 acetaminophen 增加肝代謝負荷。

usTwDifference: 台灣公費潛伏結核給藥多由都治計畫追蹤；美國公衛部門直接觀察治療模式不同，但肝功能監測閾值概念相近。

stem: A patient with chronic kidney disease stage 4 receives a first dose of ferric carboxymaltose 750 mg IV over 15 minutes in the infusion chair. Five minutes after completion BP 92/60 mmHg, HR 102 bpm, complains of chest pressure. Skin is flushed. Prior hemoglobin 8.9 g/dL, ferritin 45 ng/mL.
stemZh: 慢性腎病第四期病人首次於輸注椅接受 ferric carboxymaltose 750 mg IV，15 分鐘滴畢。完成後 5 分鐘 BP 92/60 mmHg、HR 102 bpm，主訴胸悶、皮膚潮紅。原先血色素 8.9 g/dL、ferritin 45 ng/mL。
optionA: Stop any further iron infusion and activate emergency support per facility policy
optionB: Speed the next iron infusion to finish before symptoms worsen
optionC: Administer diphenhydramine 50 mg IV and observe without notifying the provider
optionD: Maintain IV access and prepare to administer ordered epinephrine if anaphylaxis criteria are met
optionE: Document time of symptom onset, vital signs, and medications given for medicolegal review
explanationZh: FDA 與腎病照護團體對靜脈鐵劑輸注反應指引均要求辨識輸注反應與過敏樣事件並啟動急救準備。正解停止再輸注、保留管路依醫囑準備腎上腺素、並完整紀錄時序。選項B加速輸注增加暴露。選項C單用抗組織胺延誤氣道處置且未通報。

A.en: Halting further iron limits antigenic exposure when cardiopulmonary symptoms follow infusion.
A.zh: 輸注後出現心肺症狀時停止再給鐵劑可限制抗原暴露。

B.en: Increasing infusion rate escalates free iron exposure during an evolving reaction.
B.zh: 反應進行中加速輸注會提高游離鐵暴露。

C.en: Antihistamine monotherapy without provider communication delays escalation for possible anaphylaxis.
C.zh: 未告知醫師僅給抗組織胺可能延誤過敏性休克升級處置。

D.en: Patent access allows ordered epinephrine administration if stridor or hypotension progresses.
D.zh: 保持管路可在喘鳴或低血壓惡化時依醫囑給腎上腺素。

E.en: Detailed timing supports pharmacovigilance reporting and quality review of infusion practices.
E.zh: 詳細時序有助藥物警戒通報與輸注品質檢討。

usTwDifference: 台灣門診靜脈鐵劑多在醫院日間中心執行；美國輸液中心保險給付條件不同，急救藥物配置規範類似。

stem: A psychiatric unit patient on clozapine 400 mg at bedtime has ANC 1.2 ×10³/µL today, down from 2.4 ×10³/µL last week. Afebrile, denies sore throat. WBC 3.8 ×10³/µL. Last clozapine level not available.
stemZh: 精神科病房病人睡前 clozapine 400 mg，今日 ANC 1.2 ×10³/µL，上週 2.4 ×10³/µL。無發燒、否認喉嚨痛。WBC 3.8 ×10³/µL。最近無 clozapine 濃度資料。
optionA: Continue clozapine because ANC remains above 1.0 ×10³/µL
optionB: Hold clozapine per REMS thresholds, notify the provider, and repeat CBC per monitoring program
optionC: Give filgrastim 300 mcg subcutaneously without orders
optionD: Discontinue all antipsychotics simultaneously to cleanse the marrow
explanationZh: 依據 FDA clozapine REMS，嗜中性球下降達特定裁罰值需停藥並密集追蹤。正解按計畫暫停並通知醫師重複血球。選項A忽略漸進式骨髓抑制。選項C升白針需醫師評估適應症。選項D驟停所有抗精神病藥可能造成反彈精神症狀。

A.en: Borderline ANC with a steep downward trend still triggers program rules before critical neutropenia develops.
A.zh: 嗜中性球邊緣值但快速下降仍可能觸發停藥規則。

B.en: REMS-compliant holding and repeat testing protects against agranulocytosis progression.
B.zh: 依 REMS 暫停並複驗可降低無顆粒球症惡化風險。

C.en: Colony-stimulating factors are not nurse-initiated for mild neutropenia without hematology input.
C.zh: 未經血液科評估，護理不可自為輕度嗜中性球低下施打升白針。

D.en: Abrupt polypharmacy cessation risks acute psychotic decompensation unrelated to marrow recovery speed.
D.zh: 一次停所有抗精神病藥可能急性惡化，與骨髓恢復速度無直接幫助。

usTwDifference: 台灣 clozapine 血球監測由院內藥事與精神科共同管理；美國 REMS 線上登錄強制性高，護理核對閾值流程相近。

stem: While priming a nitroglycerin infusion at 5 mcg/min, the nurse notices pink discoloration in the newly spiked IV bag prepared by pharmacy 30 minutes ago. The patient has ischemic chest pain with BP 148/92 mmHg, HR 76 bpm, SpO₂ 96%.
stemZh: 護理師在 priming nitroglycerin 輸注 5 mcg/min 時，發現藥局 30 分鐘前調配的輸液袋出現粉紅色變色。病人缺血性胸痛，BP 148/92 mmHg、HR 76 bpm、SpO₂ 96%。
optionA: Begin the infusion because slight color change is expected with nitroglycerin
optionB: Discard the bag, obtain a fresh admixture from pharmacy, and delay start until stability is verified
optionC: Add ascorbic acid to the bag at the bedside to restore clarity
optionD: Double the concentration so less volume delivers the same dose
explanationZh: USP 與靜脈藥物相容性資料提醒硝酸甘油在聚氯乙烯器材或降解時可能變色，床邊應拒用可疑溶液。正解停用並換新調配。選項A可能輸注失效劑量。選項C床邊添加物不安全。選項D改變濃度需新醫囑與重新計算。

A.en: Unexpected pink hue after short storage suggests adsorption or degradation that alters delivered micrograms per minute.
A.zh: 短時間內異常粉紅色可能吸附或降解，實際微克/分鐘已改變。

B.en: Pharmacy replacement ensures polyethylene-compatible materials and verified stability for anti-ischemic therapy.
B.zh: 藥局重配可確認相容材質與穩定性，保障抗缺血治療。

C.en: Compounding antioxidants at the bedside introduces sterility and dosing errors.
C.zh: 床邊加入抗氧化劑有無菌與劑量錯誤風險。

D.en: Changing concentration without orders misaligns pump programming with prescribed titration tables.
D.zh: 未醫囑改濃度會使幫浦設定與滴定表不一致。

usTwDifference: 台灣多已改用非 PVC 輸注套組調配硝酸甘油；美國仍強調材質標示，護理拒絕變色溶液的原則一致。

stem: A 70-year-old with Parkinson disease takes carbidopa-levodopa 25/100 mg q4h while awake. He develops sudden hyperthermia 39.2°C, lead-pipe rigidity, and confusion 45 minutes after receiving metoclopramide 10 mg IV for nausea. CK 1,800 U/L, WBC 11 ×10³/µL.
stemZh: 70 歲巴金森病人清醒時每 4 小時服用 carbidopa-levodopa 25/100 mg。接受 metoclopramide 10 mg IV 止吐 45 分鐘後突然體溫 39.2°C、鉛管樣僵硬與意識混亂。CK 1800 U/L、WBC 11 ×10³/µL。
optionA: Repeat metoclopramide because nausea may return
optionB: Notify the rapid response team and provider about suspected neuroleptic malignant syndrome precipitated by dopamine blockade
optionC: Give another dose of levodopa orally to overcome the reaction
optionD: Cool the patient with ice packs only and resume normal visiting hours
explanationZh: 依據 MDS 對多巴胺拮抗劑於巴金森病人禁忌的共識，metoclopramide 可促發惡性症候群樣狀態。正解啟動急救通報並由醫師主導支持治療與停藥。選項A加重阻斷。選項C口服劑在急性症候可能吸收不穩且不足。選項D僅局部降溫忽略重症處置。

A.en: Additional dopamine blockade worsens rigidity and hyperthermia in this presentation.
A.zh: 再加多巴胺拮抗劑會惡化僵硬與高熱。

B.en: Rapid escalation mobilizes cooling, benzodiazepines, or ICU therapies per institutional neuroleptic malignant syndrome protocol.
B.zh: 快速通報可啟動降溫、苯二氮平或加護處置的機構流程。

C.en: Oral levodopa during obtundation and ileus risk does not replace emergent supportive care.
C.zh: 意識障礙與可能腸麻痺時，口服 levodopa 無法取代緊急支持治療。

D.en: Localized cooling without monitoring airway and renal function neglects rhabdomyolysis indicated by CK 1,800 U/L.
D.zh: CK 已高仍只做局部降溫，忽略橫紋肌溶解的全人監測。

usTwDifference: 台灣急診對巴金森病人止吐常改用非多巴胺拮抗劑；美國黑框警告亦限制 metoclopramide 長期使用，但急性誘發風險相同。

stem: A patient with gout flare receives colchicine 0.6 mg BID. CrCl is estimated 40 mL/min. Today he reports new watery diarrhea eight times, abdominal cramping, and tingling fingers. WBC 8 ×10³/µL, platelets 210 ×10³/µL.
stemZh: 痛風發作病人服用 colchicine 0.6 mg BID，估計 CrCl 40 mL/min。今日水瀉八次、腹痛與手指麻木。WBC 8 ×10³/µL、血小板 210 ×10³/µL。
optionA: Hold colchicine and notify the provider about possible toxicity in renal impairment
optionB: Increase colchicine to TID to control joint inflammation faster
optionC: Monitor for dehydration and check basic metabolic panel if ordered
optionD: Administer loperamide aggressively without assessing for ileus
optionE: Assess peripheral neuropathy symptoms and fall risk after GI losses
explanationZh: ACR 痛風管理指引提醒腎功能下降需調降 colchicine 並警覺腸道與神經毒性。正解停藥通報、追蹤代謝與脱水、評估神經症狀與跌倒。選項B加量與腎功能及腹瀉相悖。選項D未排除毒性或阻塞前大量使用止瀉藥有風險。

A.en: Renally cleared colchicine with profuse diarrhea signals dose-related toxicity needing prescriber review.
A.zh: 腎排泄的 colchicine 若大量腹瀉，多為劑量相關毒性需醫師檢視。

B.en: TID escalation without dose adjustment for CrCl 40 mL/min raises marrow suppression risk.
B.zh: CrCl 40 mL/min 未調整即改 TID，骨髓抑制風險上升。

C.en: Electrolyte shifts from GI losses can worsen cramping and cardiac excitability during polypharmacy.
C.zh: 腸胃流失電解質可加重抽筋與多藥下的心臟興奮性。

D.en: Antimotility agents mask colchicine-induced ileus signs and delay decontamination decisions.
D.zh: 止蠕動藥可能掩蓋 colchicine 相關麻痺性腸阻塞徵象。

E.en: Neuropathy complaints after colchicine merit gait assessment to prevent injury from orthostasis.
E.zh: 服藥後神經症狀需評估步態，預防姿位性低血壓跌倒。

usTwDifference: 台灣 colchicine 劑量與基因多型性監測較少例行；美國藥物交互作用黑框警告同樣要求腎調整，護理通報毒性重點一致。

stem: A patient with pulmonary fibrosis starts nintedanib 150 mg PO BID with meals. After 4 days she notes dark urine, intense pruritus, and scleral icterus. ALT 340 U/L, AST 290 U/L, total bilirubin 3.2 mg/dL, ALP 180 U/L.
stemZh: 肺纖維化病人餐中服用 nintedanib 150 mg BID。四天後茶色尿、劇癢與鞏膜黃疸。ALT 340 U/L、AST 290 U/L、總膽紅素 3.2 mg/dL、ALP 180 U/L。
optionA: Continue the antifibrotic and add diphenhydramine for itching
optionB: Stop nintedanib, notify the provider urgently, and anticipate hepatology labs and drug cessation counseling
optionC: Switch to high-dose prednisone on your own to protect the liver
optionD: Tell the patient to skip dinner doses only while keeping breakfast doses
explanationZh: 參照 FDA 藥品標示與 ATS 相關衛教，nintedanib 可致肝毒性，出現黃疸需立即停藥並醫療介入。正解停藥、緊急聯絡醫師並準備進一步檢驗。選項A持續暴露加重肝炎。選項C類固醇非護理可自開。選項D部分停藥缺乏醫師計畫。

A.en: Antihistamines do not treat hepatocellular injury with conjugated hyperbilirubinemia.
A.zh: 抗組織胺無法治療合併高膽紅素的肝細胞損傷。

B.en: Immediate cessation limits ongoing transaminitis while the team rules out competing causes.
B.zh: 立即停藥可限制持續轉氨酶升高並讓團隊鑑別其他原因。

C.en: Empiric corticosteroids for suspected DILI require diagnosis and are not nurse-prescribed.
C.zh: 疑似藥物性肝傷害的類固醇需診斷支持，非護理可自開。

D.en: Partial adherence without monitoring still exposes the liver and confuses causality assessment.
D.zh: 未監測下只吃半量仍暴露肝臟並干擾因果判讀。

usTwDifference: 台灣抗纖維化藥物給付需事前審查；美國專責藥局配送常見，出現黃疸時停藥通報流程一致。

stem: A neonatal ICU infant receives caffeine citrate 5 mg/kg IV load followed by 2.5 mg/kg daily. Twelve hours later heart rate trends 190–200/min while sleeping, jitteriness noted on handles. Serum glucose 82 mg/dL, Na⁺ 138 mEq/L.
stemZh: 新生兒加護病嬰接受 caffeine citrate 5 mg/kg IV loading 之後每日 2.5 mg/kg。12 小時後睡著時心率 190–200/min，碰觸時顫抖。血糖 82 mg/dL、Na⁺ 138 mEq/L。
optionA: Ignore caffeine because neonatal resting heart rates are naturally above 180
optionB: Notify the neonatologist about suspected caffeine toxicity and request serum level or dose review
optionC: Administer propranolol 0.1 mg/kg IV without orders
optionD: Double the daily caffeine to consolidate apnea protection
explanationZh: 依據 AAP 新生兒咖啡因使用綜述，中毒可表現心動過速與神經興奮，需醫師評估濃度或調整劑量。正解通報新生兒科檢驗或調整。選項A忽略藥理警訊。選項C乙型阻斷劑需醫囑與監測。選項D加量惡化毒性。

A.en: Persistent 200/min rates with tremor after loading suggest methylxanthine excess rather than benign variation.
A.zh: 負荷後持續 200/min 且顫抖，較像甲基黃嘌呤過量而非良性變異。

B.en: Neonatology can trend levels or reduce maintenance dosing to preserve apnea therapy without toxicity.
B.zh: 新生兒科可監測濃度或降低維持劑量，在毒性與呼吸中止保護間平衡。

C.en: Beta blockade in a stimulant-toxic neonate requires ICU oversight and is not nursing-initiated.
C.zh: 毒性新生兒使用乙型阻斷劑需加護監測，非護理可自開。

D.en: Increasing caffeine after tachycardia contradicts toxidrome management.
D.zh: 心動過速後再加咖啡因違反中毒處置邏輯。

usTwDifference: 台灣 NICU 咖啡因多為院內調劑；美國現成配方普及，但濃度監測決策仍屬醫師。

stem: A patient with multiple sclerosis receives natalizumab 300 mg IV every 4 weeks. Before dose 13, she reports new persistent unilateral vision blur for 5 days but denies pain. BP 118/74 mmHg, afebrile. Last brain MRI 6 months ago was stable.
stemZh: 多發性硬化病人每四週輸注 natalizumab 300 mg。第 13 劑前主訴單側視力模糊持續 5 天，否認疼痛。BP 118/74 mmHg、無發燒。六個月前腦部 MRI 穩定。
optionA: Proceed with infusion and schedule ophthalmology next month
optionB: Hold the biologic, notify the neurologist, and initiate PML risk evaluation before additional infusions
optionC: Administer IV methylprednisolone 1 g without orders to sharpen vision
optionD: Switch to oral fingolimod samples from the clinic drawer
explanationZh: 依據 FDA natalizumab REMS 與 AAN 監測建議，新發神經視覺症狀需先排除 PML 再輸注。正解暫停藥物並聯絡神經科安排影像與實驗室。選項A可能延誤診斷。選項C高劑量類固醇無指導下使用不當。選項D未醫囑更換疾病修飾藥違規。

A.en: Infusing an integrin blocker before ruling out JC virus-related demyelination risks irreversible disability.
A.zh: 未排除 JC 病毒相關去髓鞘就輸注整合素阻斷劑，可能不可逆失能。

B.en: Holding dose permits MRI and CSF algorithms that guide restart or therapy change.
B.zh: 暫停劑量才能進行 MRI 與腦脊髓液流程，決定是否續用或換藥。

C.en: Blind steroid pulses mask infectious demyelination progression without a diagnosis.
C.zh: 盲目類固醇脈衝可能掩蓋感染性去髓鞘進展。

D.en: S1P modulator initiation requires cardiac monitoring and is not interchangeable from a sample closet.
D.zh: S1P 調節劑起始需心臟監測，不可從樣品櫃任意轉換。

usTwDifference: 台灣健保對 natalizumab 續用需定期療效審查；美國 REMS 登錄嚴格，護理對新神經症狀暫停輸注的標準相同。

stem: A patient on chronic phenytoin has albumin 2.0 g/dL. Free phenytoin level is 2.8 mcg/mL (therapeutic 1–2 mcg/mL). He is ataxic with nystagmus. INR 1.1, Mg²⁺ 1.9 mg/dL.
stemZh: 長期服用 phenytoin 病人 albumin 2.0 g/dL。Free phenytoin 2.8 mcg/mL（治療窗 1–2 mcg/mL）。步態不穩與眼球震顫。INR 1.1、Mg²⁺ 1.9 mg/dL。
optionA: Notify the provider that protein binding changes may produce toxicity despite total level appearing normal
optionB: Encourage extra protein shakes only and continue the same phenytoin dose
optionC: Implement fall precautions and neurological checks per neuro assessment protocol
optionD: Administer fosphenytoin 15 mg PE/kg IV now because levels are high
optionE: Review interacting medications that displace phenytoin from albumin
explanationZh: 依據 ASHP 抗癲癇藥物監測建議，低白蛋白時應依自由濃度判讀毒性。正解向醫師說明蛋白結合變化、執行防跌與神經評估、檢視置換藥物。選項B飲食無法快速修正結合率。選項D再加載劑量於已過量自由濃度時危險。

A.en: Elevated free fraction explains cerebellar signs when total phenytoin might look deceptively low.
A.zh: 自由分率上升可解釋小腦症狀，而總濃度可能看似不高。

B.en: Dietary protein does not acutely normalize binding sites saturated by drug displacement.
B.zh: 飲食蛋白無法立即逆轉被置換的結合位點。

C.en: Ataxia raises injury risk requiring environmental safeguards and scheduled neuro checks.
C.zh: 步態不穩需環境防護與排程神經檢查。

D.en: Additional phenytoin loading when free drug is supratherapeutic risks status epilepticus from toxicity versus control imbalance.
D.zh: 自由濃度已高時再加載，毒性與控制失衡風險大。

E.en: Valproate or renal uremia can alter binding and should be reconciled with pharmacy.
E.zh: 丙戊酸或尿毒可改變結合，需與藥師核對。

usTwDifference: 台灣檢驗室較少即時報告 free phenytoin；美國加護單位較常追蹤自由濃度，護理防跌與通報原則相同。

stem: A patient receives rituximab 375 mg/m² for lymphoma. Twenty minutes into infusion, temp 38.0°C, BP 98/64 mmHg, HR 112 bpm, mild urticaria on chest. Premedications included diphenhydramine and acetaminophen per protocol.
stemZh: 淋巴癌病人輸注 rituximab 375 mg/m²。開始 20 分鐘後體溫 38.0°C、BP 98/64 mmHg、HR 112 bpm，胸部輕微蕁麻疹。依規範已給 diphenhydramine 與 acetaminophen 前驅用藥。
optionA: Continue at the same rate because fever is below 38.3°C
optionB: Stop the infusion, monitor vitals closely, notify the provider, and follow monoclonal antibody reaction protocol
optionC: Switch the medication to IVIG without consulting oncology
optionD: Disconnect the tubing and leave the patient unattended to find another nurse
explanationZh: ONS 化療與生物製劑輸注安全標準要求出現輸注反應徵象時先暫停並評估。正解依單株抗體反應流程停藥通報。選項A低熱合併低血壓與皮疹仍屬警訊。選項C替換藥物非護理決定。選項D離開病人不安全。

A.en: Hypotension with urticaria signals cytokine release needing pause even if temperature is modest.
A.zh: 低血壓合併蕁麻疹提示細胞激素釋放，即使體溫不高也應暫停。

B.en: Stopping the infusion contains immune activation until steroids or rate changes are ordered.
B.zh: 暫停輸注可限制免疫活化，等待類固醇或速率調整醫囑。

C.en: IVIG substitution alters oncology plan and requires hematology approval.
C.zh: 改 IVIG 改變腫瘤計畫，需血液科同意。

D.en: Leaving a hypotensive patient during a biologic reaction abandons airway surveillance.
D.zh: 生物製劑反應中丟下低血壓病人缺乏氣道監測。

usTwDifference: 台灣生物製劑多在日間化療中心；美國門診輸注中心保險給付不同，護理暫停輸注規範一致。

stem: A patient with chronic pain uses methadone 40 mg PO every 12 hours. ECG shows QTc 520 ms after starting ondansetron 8 mg IV q8h for chemotherapy. K⁺ 3.3 mEq/L, Mg²⁺ 1.7 mg/dL, Ca²⁺ 8.8 mg/dL.
stemZh: 慢性疼痛病人服用 methadone 40 mg PO q12h。化療期間使用 ondansetron 8 mg IV q8h 止吐後心電圖 QTc 520 ms。K⁺ 3.3 mEq/L、Mg²⁺ 1.7 mg/dL、Ca²⁺ 8.8 mg/dL。
optionA: Notify the provider about QT prolongation with combined methadone and serotonin antagonist risk
optionB: Administer ondansetron 16 mg IV push to control nausea faster
optionC: Hold further ondansetron until electrolytes and ECG are reviewed if directed
optionD: Ignore magnesium because the value is near lower normal
optionE: Place the patient on continuous telemetry per unit policy for torsades monitoring
explanationZh: FDA 對高劑量 ondansetron QT 警語與 SAMHSA 對 methadone 心電監測教育一致指出多重延長 QT 因子需整合處置。正解通報延長 QT、在指示下暫停止吐藥、並依政策telemetry。選項B加倍靜脈推注惡化 QT。選項D低鎂仍會放大風險。

A.en: Polypharmacy QT risk needs prescriber decisions about alternative antiemetics or ECG monitoring frequency.
A.zh: 多重 QT 延長藥需醫師決定替代止吐或心電監測頻率。

B.en: Doubling IV ondansetron contradicts labeled dosing and worsens repolarization delay.
B.zh: 加倍靜脈 ondansetron 違反標示劑量並加重再極化延遲。

C.en: Temporary cessation pending review prevents additive QT stress while electrolytes are repleted.
C.zh: 覆核前暫停可避免電解質未補時的 QT 加成。

D.en: Low-normal magnesium still potentiates torsades when paired with methadone.
D.zh: 偏低鎂與 methadone 并用仍可能促發torsades。

E.en: Telemetry surveillance detects polymorphic VT during corrective therapy.
E.zh: telemetry 可在矯治期偵測多形性心室頻脈。

usTwDifference: 台灣化療病房對 QT 監測設備普及度不一；美國腫瘤科常規 ECG 追蹤較多，護理通報延長 QT 的責任相同。

stem: A patient receives desmopressin 0.3 mcg/kg IV for type 1 von Willebrand disease before tooth extraction. Two hours later Na⁺ drops from 140 to 128 mEq/L; urine output 400 mL/hour. BP 128/80 mmHg, HR 68 bpm, mental status intact.
stemZh: 第一型 von Willebrand 疾病病人在拔牙前接受 desmopressin 0.3 mcg/kg IV。兩小時後血鈉由 140 降至 128 mEq/L，尿量 400 mL/hour。BP 128/80 mmHg、HR 68 bpm、意識清楚。
optionA: Encourage free water intake to keep the patient comfortable
optionB: Notify hematology and anesthesia about acute hyponatremia after vasopressin analog and hold further DDAVP
optionC: Proceed to extraction because blood pressure is stable
optionD: Give another desmopressin dose to improve hemostasis
explanationZh: 參照 ASH 血友病中心對 DDAVP 使用的電解質監測建議，快速血鈉下降屬醫療急症風險。正解停止再給藥並通知專科評估限制自由水與檢驗趨勢。選項A自由水惡化低鈉。選項C手術忽略神經風險。選項D重複劑量加重水中毒。

A.en: Additional hypotonic intake accelerates cerebral edema risk when sodium falls 12 mEq/L in two hours.
A.zh: 兩小時降鈉 12 mEq/L 時再喝自由水會加速腦水腫風險。

B.en: Team notification aligns dental procedure risk with emergent sodium correction protocols.
B.zh: 通知團隊可把牙科風險與緊急血鈉處置流程對齊。

C.en: Hemodynamic stability does not protect against osmotic demyelination if sodium shifts continue perioperatively.
C.zh: 血流動力穩定無法保證術中鈉變化不引發神經脫髓鞘。

D.en: Repeat DDAVP without sodium correction worsens antidiuretic excess.
D.zh: 未矯正低鈉再給 DDAVP 會加重抗利尿作用。

usTwDifference: 台灣牙科門診較少處理 DDAVP 全身劑量；美國手術中心監測電解質較密集，護理通報急性低鈉原則一致。

stem: A patient with HIV on dolutegravir-lamivudine develops restlessness and diaphoresis 18 hours after receiving meperidine 50 mg IV for renal colic. Temp 37.8°C, BP 158/92 mmHg, HR 118 bpm, pupils 6 mm bilaterally.
stemZh: HIV 病人服用 dolutegravir-lamivudine，腎絞痛接受 meperidine 50 mg IV 後 18 小時焦躁、盜汗。體溫 37.8°C、BP 158/92 mmHg、HR 118 bpm、雙側瞳孔 6 mm。
optionA: Administer another 50 mg meperidine to treat apparent opioid withdrawal
optionB: Alert the provider about possible serotonin syndrome from meperidine with integrase therapy and hold further meperidine
optionC: Give haloperidol 5 mg IM to sedate the patient
optionD: Increase dolutegravir dose to stabilize mood
explanationZh: 依據 FDA meperidine 與血清素藥物交互作用警語，與多種抗反轉錄病毒併用可能升高血清素症候群風險。正解通報並停用 meperidine 由醫師處置。選項A加重血清素負荷。選項C多巴胺拮抗劑在血清素症候群爭議且需醫囑。選項D調整 ART 非止痛適應。

A.en: More meperidine adds serotonergic load when autonomic hyperactivity is already present.
A.zh: 自律神經過度活化時再加 meperidine 增加血清素負荷。

B.en: Provider evaluation differentiates serotonin toxicity from sepsis and guides cyproheptadine or benzodiazepine use.
B.zh: 醫師可鑑別血清素毒性與敗血症，並決定 cyproheptadine 或苯二氮平。

C.en: Antipsychotics may lower seizure threshold in serotonin syndrome without treating core pathophysiology.
C.zh: 抗精神病藥在血清素症候群可能降低癲癇閾值且未針對核心機轉。

D.en: Adjusting integrase dosing does not reverse opioid-serotonin interaction.
D.zh: 調整整合酶劑量無法逆轉鴉片-血清素交互作用。

usTwDifference: 台灣急診已少用 meperidine；美國仍偶見，與新世代 ART 的交互作用風險相同。

stem: A patient with myasthenia gravis takes pyridostigmine 60 mg q4h. Preoperative orders include rocuronium 50 mg IV for intubation. After incision, the surgeon requests a neuromuscular check.
stemZh: 重症肌無力病人服用 pyridostigmine 60 mg q4h。術前醫囑 rocuronium 50 mg IV 插管。切皮後外科要求神經肌肉監測。
optionA: Expect normal train-of-four because cholinesterase inhibitors shorten rocuronium duration uniformly
optionB: Communicate that anticholinesterase therapy complicates nondepolarizing blockade monitoring and document responses for anesthesia
optionC: Administer neostigmine now to deepen relaxation
optionD: Give succinylcholine 1.5 mg/kg to reset the block
explanationZh: 依據 AANMG 相關麻醉衛教摘要，重症肌無力病人對非去極化肌肉鬆弛劑反應變異大且受 pyridostigmine 影響。正解向麻醉團隊溝通監測限制並記錄反應。選項A假設過度簡化。選項C顛倒藥理。選項D未醫囑更換去極化劑高危。

A.en: MG patients may exhibit resistance or sensitivity; train-of-four cannot be assumed standard.
A.zh: MG 病人可能抗藥或敏感，train-of-four 不能假設標準。

B.en: Anesthesia relies on nursing communication about home anticholinesterase timing to interpret twitch responses.
B.zh: 麻醉解讀抽搐反應需護理提供居家抗膽鹼酯酶時程。

C.en: Neostigmine before surgery end paradoxically interacts with planned reversal sequencing.
C.zh: 術中任意給 neostigmine 會干擾預定逆轉順序。

D.en: Succinylcholine dosing in MG risks unpredictable potassium shifts and requires anesthesia orders.
D.zh: MG 病人使用 succinylcholine 鉀離子變化難預測，需麻醉醫囑。

usTwDifference: 台灣手術室神經肌肉監測儀器普及度不一；美國麻醉學會強調病歷溝通，護理傳遞用藥史重點相同。

stem: A patient with bipolar disorder on lithium carbonate 900 mg at bedtime has lithium level 1.4 mEq/L this morning after starting ibuprofen 400 mg TID for ankle sprain 3 days ago. Na⁺ 130 mEq/L, creatinine 1.4 mg/dL, complains of fine tremor.
stemZh: 雙相情感障礙病人睡前 lithium carbonate 900 mg，今早 lithium 1.4 mEq/L。三天前因踝扭傷開始 ibuprofen 400 mg TID。Na⁺ 130 mEq/L、creatinine 1.4 mg/dL，主訴細顫。
optionA: Notify psychiatry and medicine about NSAID-induced lithium retention and elevated level
optionB: Tell the patient to alternate ibuprofen with aspirin for better renal safety
optionC: Assess hydration status and recent diarrhea or vomiting that alter sodium
optionD: Encourage extra salt tablets without provider input
optionE: Monitor for neurotoxicity signs and fall precautions on the unit
explanationZh: 依據 APA 鋰鹽治療手冊，NSAID 可降低腎鋰清除並升高濃度。正解通報精神科與內科、評估容積與鈉變化原因、加強神經毒性與跌倒防護。選項B阿司匹林仍可能影響腎功能與交互作用。選項D自行補鈉缺乏監測。

A.en: Co-managed psychiatric and medical teams adjust lithium or NSAIDs when levels exceed therapeutic index with renal stress.
A.zh: 身心與內科共治可在腎壓力下調整鋰或 NSAID，避免濃度越界。

B.en: Aspirin interaction patterns differ but do not make NSAID rotation automatically safe in acute kidney injury risk.
B.zh: 阿司匹林交互作用不同，並不代表急性腎風險下輪替 NSAID 就安全。

C.en: Hyponatremia and GI losses redistribute lithium into CNS even at modest serum numbers.
C.zh: 低鈉與腸胃流失即使在看似不高的血鋰下也會使中樞暴露上升。

D.en: Unsupervised sodium loading can worsen hypertension or fluid overload in renally impaired patients.
D.zh: 腎功能受损者自行高鈉可能惡化高血壓或容積負荷。

E.en: Tremor progression to ataxia signals toxicity needing closer observation.
E.zh: 顫抖惡化至共濟失調提示毒性需更密集觀察。

usTwDifference: 台灣精神科門診追蹤鋰濃度頻率因人力而異；美國藥局系統常彙整 NSAID 交互作用，護理通報升高濃度重點相同。

stem: A patient with RA receives tocilizumab 162 mg subcutaneous weekly. Before week 8 injection, ALT rises to 95 U/L from 22 U/L baseline; denies alcohol. CBC otherwise normal, viral hepatitis panel negative last month.
stemZh: 類風濕性關節炎病人每週皮下 tocilizumab 162 mg。第八週注射前 ALT 由基期 22 U/L 升至 95 U/L，否認飲酒。其餘血球正常，上個月病毒性肝炎篩檢陰性。
optionA: Give the injection in a different site to avoid liver irritation
optionB: Hold the dose, notify rheumatology, and obtain liver test trend instructions before restarting
optionC: Add weekly methotrexate without orders to protect joints
optionD: Double the tocilizumab to achieve faster inflammation control
explanationZh: 依據 ACR 對 IL-6 抑制劑監測建議，轉氨酶上升需暫停用藥並由風濕科評估。正解暫停並聯絡專科追蹤肝功能。選項A注射部位與肝酵素無關。選項C自行加甲氨蝶呤可能肝毒性加成。選項D加量不當。

A.en: Hepatocellular enzyme elevation reflects systemic IL-6 inhibition effects, not subcutaneous site irritation.
A.zh: 肝酵素上升屬全身性藥理作用，非換注射部位可解決。

B.en: Prescriber pause rules prevent fibrosis progression while alternative DMARD plans are made.
B.zh: 醫師暫停規則可在安排替代 DMARD 時避免纖維化進展。

C.en: Methotrexate co-initiation without labs worsens hepatotoxicity on top of rising ALT.
C.zh: 在 ALT 上升時自行併用甲氨蝶呤會加重肝毒性。

D.en: Dose escalation during transaminitis magnifies drug-induced liver injury.
D.zh: 轉氨酶升高期再加劑量會放大藥物性肝傷害。

usTwDifference: 台灣生物製劑事前審查需附肝功能；美國保險授權流程不同，護理暫停注射的標準相近。

stem: A trauma patient receives tranexamic acid 1 g IV over 10 minutes within an hour of injury. Thirty minutes later he reports severe anterior thigh numbness with pallor. BP 132/84 mmHg, HR 96 bpm, pedal pulses palpable.
stemZh: 創傷病人在受傷一小時內接受 tranexamic acid 1 g IV 超過 10 分鐘。30 分鐘後主訴大腿前側嚴重麻木與蒼白。BP 132/84 mmHg、HR 96 bpm，足背動脈可觸摸。
optionA: Reassure that TXA commonly causes focal anesthesia and continue monitoring only
optionB: Notify the trauma team about acute limb ischemia symptoms that may relate to vascular injury rather than TXA alone
optionC: Apply a heating pad to improve perfusion
optionD: Administer protamine sulfate to reverse TXA
explanationZh: 依據 WHO 創傷出血處置建議，TXA 用於全身止血但仍需排除肢體血管受損。正解通報創傷團隊評估急性缺血。選項A延誤手術或栓塞處置。選項C熱敷可能加重缺血代謝需求。選項D魚精蛋白不逆轉 TXA。

A.en: Focal pallor and numbness after trauma suggest compartment or arterial compromise needing imaging, not benign drug effect.
A.zh: 創傷後局部蒼白麻木需影像排除腔室或動脈問題，非單純藥物副作用。

B.en: Trauma surgery prioritizes revascularization when neurovascular checks deteriorate despite stable systemic vitals.
B.zh: 即使全身生命徵象穩定，神經血管惡化仍優先血管再通。

C.en: Heat increases metabolic demand in a potentially ischemic limb.
C.zh: 熱敷可能增加疑似缺血肢體的代謝需求。

D.en: Protamine reverses heparin, not antifibrinolytics.
D.zh: 魚精蛋白逆轉肝素，不作用於抗纖溶藥。

usTwDifference: 台灣創傷中心對 TXA 給予時間窗教育逐步普及；美國院前給藥規範較多，護理對急性肢體症狀通報原則相同。

stem: Postpartum day 1 on the mother-baby unit, a 32-year-old with preeclampsia history receives magnesium sulfate 2 g/hour after a 4 g IV load. Deep tendon reflexes are 1+ bilaterally, RR 10/min, urine 20 mL/hour for 2 hours. BP 132/84 mmHg, oxygen saturation 97% on room air.
stemZh: 產後第一天母嬰病房，32 歲有子癇前症病史者於 4 g IV loading 後以 magnesium sulfate 2 g/hour 維持。深部肌腱反射雙側 1+、RR 10 次/分、連續 2 小時尿量 20 mL/hour。BP 132/84 mmHg、室氣 SpO₂ 97%。
optionA: Increase the magnesium rate to deepen sedation and prevent eclampsia
optionB: Stop the infusion, notify the obstetric provider, and prepare for toxicity assessment including calcium gluconate availability
optionC: Administer furosemide 40 mg IV to fix oliguria before calling anyone
optionD: Instruct slow deep breathing only because the blood pressure is normal
explanationZh: 參照 ACOG 子癇處置建議，鎂中毒早期可見反射減弱、呼吸抑制與尿量下降。正解停輸注並通知產科準備解毒與實驗室評估。選項A加重中樞抑制。選項C利尿劑未解決鎂蓄積且可能惡化電解質。選項D呼吸次數已偏低，僅口頭指導不足。

A.en: Raising the magnesium infusion when reflexes are depressed risks respiratory arrest.
A.zh: 反射已抑制時再加速鎂輸注，呼吸停止風險陡升。

B.en: Stopping magnesium and mobilizing calcium therapy matches emerging neurorespiratory toxicity.
B.zh: 停鎂並準備鈣劑符合神經呼吸毒性徵象。

C.en: Loop diuretics do not reverse CNS magnesium accumulation and may confuse volume assessment.
C.zh: 袢利尿劑無法逆轉中樞鎂蓄積，也可能干擾容積評估。

D.en: Coaching respirations cannot replace cessation of the neurodepressant infusion when RR is 10/min.
D.zh: RR 已 10 次/分時，僅指導呼吸無法取代停藥處置。

usTwDifference: 台灣產後鎂輸注多在產房延續至病房；美國部分機構由專責護理師密集測反射，人力配置不同但中毒辨識標準一致。

stem: A 10-year-old with status asthmaticus receives continuous albuterol via nebulizer. After 1 hour, potassium is 3.1 mEq/L, glucose 212 mg/dL, tremor is marked, HR 150 bpm, BP 106/62 mmHg, SpO₂ 93% on 4 L nasal cannula.
stemZh: 10 歲兒童氣喘持續狀態接受連續 albuterol 霧化。一小時後 K⁺ 3.1 mEq/L、血糖 212 mg/dL、顫抖明顯、HR 150 bpm、BP 106/62 mmHg、4 L 鼻導管 SpO₂ 93%。
optionA: Notify the pediatric provider about beta-agonist induced hypokalemia and hyperglycemia
optionB: Give insulin 10 units IV push undiluted to treat glucose 212 mg/dL
optionC: Increase nebulizer output to maximum without reassessment
optionD: Monitor ECG for ectopy and document intake of potassium-containing fluids if ordered
optionE: Assess hydration and acid-base status if repeat VBG or BMP is ordered
explanationZh: 依據 GINA 急性氣喘處置與兒科加護參考，高劑量乙二型作用劑可致低鉀與血糖上升。正解通報異常實驗室、監測心律、並配合酸鹼與容積評估。選項B兒童未經醫囑快速胰島素推注危險。選項C在未評估下加量可能加重毒性。

A.en: Electrolyte and glucose shifts from continuous beta-agonists require prescriber-directed adjustments.
A.zh: 連續乙二型作用劑造成的電解質與血糖變化需醫師調整處置。

B.en: Undiluted insulin pushes are not pediatric standing orders for moderate hyperglycemia during bronchodilator therapy.
B.zh: 氣喘霧化期中度高血糖，兒童不應未稀釋快速胰島素推注。

C.en: Maximizing nebulizer dose without weaning criteria escalates tremor and tachycardia already at HR 150 bpm.
C.zh: HR 已 150 再盲目加量會加重顫抖與心搏過速。

D.en: Hypokalemia predisposes to ventricular ectopy during continuous bronchodilation.
D.zh: 低鉀在持續支氣管擴張下易出現心室異位搏動。

E.en: Acidosis and dehydration modify bronchodilator response and potassium distribution.
E.zh: 酸中毒與脱水會改變支氣管擴張反應與鉀分布。

usTwDifference: 台灣兒童急診連續霧化設備與藥品存量因醫院而異；美國兒科加護常規監測電解質較密集，護理通報低鉀原則相同。

stem: A patient with plaque psoriasis begins apremilast 30 mg BID on day 6 after titration. He reports new suicidal ideation without plan, sleep is 3 hours nightly, PHQ-9 score rose 6 points. No prior psychiatric hospitalizations. LFTs normal.
stemZh: 斑塊型乾癬病人完成爬坡後第 6 天服用 apremilast 30 mg BID。出現無計畫之自殺意念、每晚睡 3 小時、PHQ-9 上升 6 分。無精神科住院史。肝功能正常。
optionA: Tell the patient mood changes are unrelated because apremilast is not a biologic
optionB: Hold the dose, activate suicide precautions, and notify dermatology and psychiatry per boxed warning monitoring
optionC: Double the dose to improve skin discomfort so mood improves
optionD: Add St. John’s wort from the gift shop to help sleep
explanationZh: 依據 FDA apremilast 說明書黑框與監測建議，新發或惡化憂鬱與自殺意念需停藥並精神專科介入。正解暫停、啟動防護並通報皮膚科與精神科。選項A忽略已知中樞副作用。選項C加量可能惡化情緒。選項D草本與多種藥物交互作用不可擅自併用。

A.en: PDE4 inhibitors carry psychiatric warnings independent of being a biologic agent.
A.zh: PDE4 抑制劑的精神科警語與是否生物製劑無關。

B.en: Pausing the drug and escalating mental health support aligns with regulatory monitoring obligations.
B.zh: 停藥並強化心理健康支持符合法規監測義務。

C.en: Dose escalation during emergent suicidal ideation contradicts risk mitigation.
C.zh: 自殺意念浮現時加劑量與風險降低背道而馳。

D.en: OTC herbal serotonergic products add unpredictable interactions during a drug-induced mood crisis.
D.zh: 成藥草本具血清素活性，在藥物相關情緒危機中交互作用難預測。

stem: A hospitalized patient with schizophrenia on clozapine has a positive urine pregnancy test at 5 weeks gestation. WBC 6.4 ×10³/µL, ANC 3.1 ×10³/µL, glucose fasting 102 mg/dL. She asks if she can keep the medication because voices return quickly when missed.
stemZh: 住院精神分裂症病人服用 clozapine，妊娠 5 週尿液驗孕陽性。WBC 6.4 ×10³/µL、ANC 3.1 ×10³/µL、空腹血糖 102 mg/dL。病人詢問是否可續用，因停藥後幻聽很快復發。
optionA: Continue clozapine indefinitely because ANC is normal today
optionB: Notify psychiatry and obstetrics immediately for teratogenicity, granulocytosis monitoring, and alternative antipsychotic planning
optionC: Switch to high-dose haloperidol decanoate IM today without orders
optionD: Discharge her on the same dose and schedule a clinic visit in 6 months
explanationZh: 依據 APA 妊娠精神用藥共識與 FDA REMS，clozapine 於孕期屬高風險決策需跨科整合。正解即刻聯繫精神科與產科討論胎兒風險、監測與替代藥。選項A忽略胚胎暴露諮商。選項C長效針劑轉換需縝密交叉滴定。選項D延誤孕期管理。

A.en: Normal ANC does not resolve fetal medication risk or obstetric co-management needs.
A.zh: 嗜中性球正常無法免除胎兒藥物風險與產科共治需求。

B.en: Specialty co-management weighs psychotic relapse against pregnancy safety and arranges ultrasound or metabolic monitoring.
B.zh: 專科共治可權衡精神病復發與妊娠安全並安排影像或代謝監測。

C.en: Depot antipsychotic conversion requires loading protocols and is not a nursing substitution for clozapine.
C.zh: 長效針劑轉換需負荷方案，非護理可擅自取代 clozapine。

D.en: Deferring multidisciplinary review for half a year misses first-trimester organogenesis counseling.
D.zh: 延後半年才追蹤會錯過器官形成期諮商窗口。

usTwDifference: 台灣懷孕病人使用 clozapine 案例少，常需倫理與法律諮詢；美國機構多有母胎醫學會診流程，護理通報跨科原則相同。

stem: A patient with HFrEF receives sacubitril-valsartan 49/51 mg BID. This morning creatinine rises from 1.1 to 1.8 mg/dL, K⁺ 5.4 mEq/L, BP 98/60 mmHg, denies diarrhea. BNP 640 pg/mL yesterday.
stemZh: 射出分率下降心衰竭病人服用 sacubitril-valsartan 49/51 mg BID。今早 creatinine 由 1.1 升至 1.8 mg/dL、K⁺ 5.4 mEq/L、BP 98/60 mmHg，否認腹瀉。昨日 BNP 640 pg/mL。
optionA: Hold the next doses and notify cardiology or nephrology about acute kidney injury pattern on ARNI
optionB: Advise extra potassium-rich bananas to support myocardial function
optionC: Assess volume status, recent NSAID use, and concurrent diuretic timing
optionD: Double valsartan component by splitting tablets at the bedside
optionE: Prepare repeat BMP and strict intake/output documentation per provider direction
explanationZh: 依據 ACC/AHA 心衰竭藥物治療指引，ARNI 可影響腎血流與血鉀，急性腎功能惡化需暫停並由醫師評估。正解暫停、探查容量與腎毒性因子、並準備追蹤電解質與尿量紀錄。選項B在高鉀時危險。選項D自行調整複方劑量不合法且危險。

A.en: Rising creatinine with hyperkalemia after RAAS-neprilysin inhibition needs prescriber-directed pause and workup.
A.zh: RAAS-neprilysin 抑制後肌酸酐上升合併高鉀，需醫師指示暫停與檢查。

B.en: Dietary potassium supplementation contradicts K⁺ 5.4 mEq/L management.
B.zh: 血鉀 5.4 mEq/L 時再鼓勵高鉀食物與治療方向相反。

C.en: NSAIDs and diuretic timing often explain functional AKI in compensated heart failure.
C.zh: 代償心衰竭的功能性腎傷害常與 NSAID 或利尿劑時序有關。

D.en: Manipulating fixed-dose combination tablets alters sacubitril exposure unpredictably.
D.zh: 切割固定劑量複方會不可預測改變 sacubitril 暴露量。

E.en: Serial BMP and I/O clarify whether hyperkalemia requires emergent therapy versus medication adjustment.
E.zh: 連續 BMP 與出入量能區分需緊急降鉀或僅調藥。

usTwDifference: 台灣 ARNI 給付需特定條件與事前審；美國藥價與共付額高，護理對腎功能警訊通報責任相同。

stem: A 19-year-old athlete receives IV ketorolac 30 mg once for renal colic at 22:00. Past medical history includes exercise-induced asthma controlled by albuterol PRN. At 23:15 RR 24/min, mild diffuse wheeze, SpO₂ 94% on room air, BP 118/76 mmHg.
stemZh: 19 歲運動員 22:00 因腎絞痛單次接受 IV ketorolac 30 mg。病史有運動誘發氣喘，平時 albuterol PRN。23:15 RR 24 次/分、輕度瀰漫喘鳴、室氣 SpO₂ 94%、BP 118/76 mmHg。
optionA: Give another ketorolac dose because pain control takes priority over wheeze
optionB: Notify the provider about NSAID-associated bronchospasm in reactive airway disease and prepare ordered bronchodilator therapy
optionC: Tell the patient to run laps to clear the wheeze
optionD: Start high-flow oxygen at 40 L/min without assessing orders
explanationZh: 依據 GINA 與 NSAID 氣喘風險教育，非類固醇抗發炎藥可誘發支氣管收縮。正解通報醫師並依醫囑給予支氣管擴張劑與監測。選項A重複 NSAID 加重收縮。選項C運動誘發族群更不宜。選項D高流量氧需醫囑與適應症評估。

A.en: Repeat ketorolac after new wheeze escalates COX inhibition in sensitive airways.
A.zh: 喘鳴出現後再給 ketorolac 會在敏感氣道加重 COX 抑制效应。

B.en: Provider notification links bronchospasm to recent NSAID timing and orders beta-agonist therapy.
B.zh: 告知醫師可把喘鳴與 NSAID 時序連結並開立乙二型作用劑。

C.en: Exercise provocation is contraindicated when bronchospasm follows a pharmacologic trigger.
C.zh: 藥物誘發喘鳴後再運動誘發屬不當刺激。

D.en: High-flow oxygen protocols require indications and monitoring beyond mild hypoxemia at 94%.
D.zh: 高流量氧氣需指征與監測，非輕度 94% 即自行啟動。

usTwDifference: 台灣急診單次 ketorolac 上限與年齡限制常寫入院內協議；美國藥典建議縮短療程，護理辨識氣道反應原則相同。

stem: A patient with MDR-TB receives bedaquiline 400 mg daily for 2 weeks then 200 mg thrice weekly with meals. QTc 2 weeks ago 430 ms; today QTc 510 ms. K⁺ 3.9 mEq/L, Mg²⁺ 1.8 mg/dL, HR 88 bpm, denies syncope.
stemZh: 多重抗藥結核病人餐中服用 bedaquiline：前兩週每日 400 mg，之後每週三次 200 mg。兩週前 QTc 430 ms，今日 QTc 510 ms。K⁺ 3.9 mEq/L、Mg²⁺ 1.8 mg/dL、HR 88 bpm，否認暈厥。
optionA: Continue therapy because the patient is asymptomatic
optionB: Hold bedaquiline, notify the TB physician, and arrange ECG and electrolyte optimization per ATS/CDC monitoring
optionC: Give ondansetron 8 mg IV to settle the heart rhythm
optionD: Switch to linezolid 600 mg BID without consulting infectious disease
explanationZh: 依據 CDC 與 WHO 對 bedaquiline 的心電監測建議，QT 顯著延長需停藥並由專科調整方案。正解暫停並通知結核科安排追蹤心電與電解質。選項A無症狀仍可能猝死。選項C ondansetron 亦延長 QT。選項D更換第二線藥需感染科整合。

A.en: Torsades can occur without prodromal syncope when QTc jumps 80 ms.
A.zh: QTc 大幅上升時，未必先有暈厥仍可能發生扭转型室速。

B.en: Programmatic TB clinics pause QT-prolonging therapy until reversible causes are corrected.
B.zh: 結核專案門診會在可逆原因排除前暫停延長 QT 的藥物。

C.en: Ondansetron adds QT liability on top of bedaquiline rather than fixing repolarization.
C.zh: ondansetron 與 bedaquiline 加成 QT 風險，無法修正再極化。

D.en: Linezolid carries serotonin and marrow risks requiring ID stewardship, not nursing substitution.
D.zh: linezolid 有骨髓與血清素風險，需感染科用藥管理，非護理可擅自轉換。

usTwDifference: 台灣 MDR-TB 多半集中治療；美國公共衛生部門直接觀察治療與心電追蹤資源不同，護理通報 QT 延長責任一致。

stem: A patient with CML takes nilotinib 300 mg BID on an empty stomach. She reports sudden upper abdominal pain radiating to the back 90 minutes after breakfast dose with vomiting once. Lipase drawn STAT is 890 U/L, glucose 118 mg/dL, amylase 120 U/L.
stemZh: 慢性骨髓性白血病病人空腹規則服用 nilotinib 300 mg BID。早餐后劑量 90 分鐘後突發上腹痛向背部放射，嘔吐一次。急抽 lipase 890 U/L、血糖 118 mg/dL、amylase 120 U/L。
optionA: Hold further nilotinib doses and notify hematology about possible tyrosine kinase inhibitor pancreatitis
optionB: Crush the next capsule into apple juice to speed gastric emptying
optionC: Keep NPO status pending provider evaluation and prepare IV access for hydration orders
optionD: Give another dose immediately to maintain BCR-ABL suppression
optionE: Monitor glucose and pain trend because TKIs alter endocrine pancreatic function
explanationZh: 依據 NCCN CML 支持照護與藥品說明書，nilotinib 可致胰炎，急性腹痛合併高 lipase 需停藥並醫療評估。正解暫停、禁食準備輸液醫囑、並監測血糖與疼痛。選項B破壞服藥規定且無助胰炎。選項D持續暴露惡化壞死風險。

A.en: Stopping the offending TKI prevents ongoing pancreatic enzyme leakage while imaging is arranged.
A.zh: 停用可疑 TKI 可避免影像檢查前持續胰酶外漏。

B.en: Crushing nilotinib violates fasting administration rules and does not treat pancreatitis.
B.zh: 磨粉違反空腹服藥規定，也無法治療胰炎。

C.en: NPO with IV access supports resuscitation pending surgical or medical management decisions.
C.zh: 禁食並建立靜脈路徑可支援復甦，等待外科或內科處置。

D.en: Continuing the drug during acute pancreatitis risks necrosis and systemic inflammation.
D.zh: 急性胰炎期續用藥物增加壞死與全身發炎風險。

E.en: TKIs can disturb islet function; glucose trends inform endocrine complications.
E.zh: TKI 可能影響胰島功能，血糖趨勢可提示內分泌併發症。

usTwDifference: 台灣癌症中心藥師常逐筆核對 TKI 服藥時間；美國零售藥局諮詢較多，護理對急性腹痛停藥通報原則相同。

stem: A patient with opioid use disorder receives first dose methadone 30 mg observed at 08:00. By 14:00 he is drowsy but arousable, RR 8/min, SpO₂ 88% on room air, BP 100/64 mmHg, pin pupils 2 mm.
stemZh: 鴉片使用疾患病人 08:00 首次觀察下服用 methadone 30 mg。14:00 嗜睡但可叫醒、RR 8 次/分、室氣 SpO₂ 88%、BP 100/64 mmHg、針尖樣瞳孔 2 mm。
optionA: Let him sleep it off overnight without waking checks
optionB: Administer naloxone per protocol with airway support and notify the opioid treatment program physician
optionC: Give another 10 mg methadone to prevent withdrawal tomorrow
optionD: Place in prone position without monitoring
explanationZh: 依據 SAMHSA 鴉片治療計畫用藥指引，初次劑量後延遲性呼吸抑制需依急救協議處理。正解在支持氣道下依規範給予 naloxone 並通知醫師。選項A延遲性抑制可致命。選項C再加劑量加重中毒。選項D俯臥無監測增加窒息風險。

A.en: Methadone’s long half-life allows late-onset respiratory depression needing active surveillance.
A.zh: methadone 半衰期長，遲發呼吸抑制需主動監測。

B.en: Protocolized naloxone with airway maneuvers reverses life-threatening hypoventilation while preserving access to addiction care.
B.zh: 依協議 naloxone 合併氣道處置可逆轉致命低換氣並保留後續成癮照護。

C.en: Additional opioid during pinpoint pupils and bradypnea deepens overdose.
C.zh: 針尖瞳孔且呼吸慢時再加鴉片會加深過量。

D.en: Unmonitored prone positioning does not substitute for ventilation support during opioid toxicity.
D.zh: 無監測俯臥無法取代鴉片中毒時的換氣支持。

usTwDifference: 台灣美沙冬替代療法多在指定醫院；美國 OTP 診所密度高，急救 naloxone 法規不同但護理反應原則一致。

stem: A patient with pulmonary hypertension on riociguat 1.5 mg TID reports sudden severe epistaxis after minor nose blowing. Hemoglobin 10.2 g/dL, platelets 180 ×10³/µL, INR 1.0, BP 108/70 mmHg, HR 96 bpm.
stemZh: 肺動脈高壓病人服用 riociguat 1.5 mg TID，輕擤鼻後突然嚴重流鼻血。血色素 10.2 g/dL、血小板 180 ×10³/µL、INR 1.0、BP 108/70 mmHg、HR 96 bpm。
optionA: Have the patient tilt the head back and swallow the blood
optionB: Apply firm anterior pressure, keep the head forward, notify cardiology or pulmonology, and hold further riociguat until bleeding is controlled
optionC: Start dabigatran to thin the clot
optionD: Insert cotton deep into the posterior pharynx without visualization
explanationZh: 依據 ESC/ERS 肺高壓藥物衛教，可溶性鳥苷酸環化酶刺激劑增加出血風險。正解標準鼻出血急救姿勢、加壓止血、通報專科並暫停可疑促出血藥至出血控制。選項A吞血與頭後仰屬舊式錯誤。選項C抗凝雪上加霜。選項D盲目後塞可能窒息。

A.en: Swallowing blood irritates the stomach and head-back positioning impairs airway protection.
A.zh: 吞血刺激胃且頭後仰不利氣道保護。

B.en: Forward lean with pressure and specialty notification balances hemorrhage control with PAH medication decisions.
B.zh: 身體前傾加壓並通知專科，可在止血與肺高壓用藥決策間取得平衡。

C.en: Anticoagulation during uncontrolled epistaxis worsens blood loss despite normal INR.
C.zh: 活動性鼻出血時再加抗凝，即使 INR 正常也會加重失血。

D.en: Blind posterior packing risks aspiration without visualization and ENT support.
D.zh: 未可視化下盲目後塞有吸入風險。

usTwDifference: 台灣 riociguat 取得成本高且需事前審；美國專科藥局配送常見，護理止血與停藥通報原則相同。

stem: A patient with metastatic breast cancer has a Port-A-Cath accessed for docetaxel 75 mg/m² in 250 mL D5W over 60 minutes. Ten minutes after start, the chest wall near the port site burns and a new cough begins. Vitals BP 128/78 mmHg, HR 96 bpm, SpO₂ 95% on room air, temp 36.8°C.
stemZh: 轉移性乳癌病人 Port-A-Cath 已穿刺，準備 docetaxel 75 mg/m² 溶於 250 mL D5W 滴注 60 分鐘。開始 10 分鐘後穿刺附近胸壁灼熱並新發咳嗽。生命徵象 BP 128/78 mmHg、HR 96 bpm、室氣 SpO₂ 95%、體溫 36.8°C。
optionA: Increase the infusion rate to finish before irritation worsens
optionB: Stop the infusion, assess extravasation versus hypersensitivity, keep venous access, and notify oncology per chemo reaction policy
optionC: Flush the port with 30 mL saline rapidly to push drug into central circulation
optionD: Apply cold packs only and continue the infusion silently
explanationZh: 依據 ONS 化療與生物製劑給藥標準，紫杉烷類輸注期灼痛與咳嗽需先停藥鑑別外滲或過敏。正解暫停、評估皮膚與呼吸徵象、保留管路並通知腫瘤科。選項A加速輸注加重暴露。選項C強沖可能將刺激藥物推入組織。選項D冷敷不能取代停藥評估。

A.en: Accelerating taxane delivery after localized burning risks tissue injury or anaphylactoid reaction.
A.zh: 局部灼熱後加速紫杉烷輸注，增加組織損傷或類過敏反應風險。

B.en: Stopping the infusion permits differentiation between vesicant extravasation and cytokine-mediated cough while preserving access for antidotes.
B.zh: 停輸注可區分發泡性外滲與細胞激素相關咳嗽，並保留給予解毒劑的管路。

C.en: Aggressive flushing through a compromised port seal can worsen subcutaneous drug deposition.
C.zh: 接口可能不完整時強力沖洗會加重皮下沉積。

D.en: Cold therapy without pausing vesicant infusion delays recognition of systemic hypersensitivity.
D.zh: 不停藥僅冷敷會延誤全身過敏辨識。

usTwDifference: 台灣化療多在日間化療中心由化療專責護理師執行；美國門診輸注中心保險給付不同，外滲通報表單格式亦異。

stem: A patient with alcohol-associated cirrhosis receives lactulose 30 mL TID for HE. Today he has three watery stools, abdominal distension, and reports cramping. Na⁺ 128 mEq/L, K⁺ 3.0 mEq/L, ammonia 98 µmol/L, creatinine 1.0 mg/dL.
stemZh: 酒精性肝硬化病人服用 lactulose 30 mL TID 治療肝腦病變。今日水瀉三次、腹脹與絞痛。Na⁺ 128 mEq/L、K⁺ 3.0 mEq/L、ammonia 98 µmol/L、creatinine 1.0 mg/dL。
optionA: Notify the hepatology team about hyponatremia and hypokalemia during aggressive lactulose therapy
optionB: Double lactulose to 60 mL every 2 hours without provider input
optionC: Assess for peritoneal signs and measure abdominal girth if protocol allows
optionD: Encourage free water boluses to celebrate improved stool frequency
optionE: Document mental status and asterixis each shift to correlate ammonia trends with therapy
explanationZh: 依據 AASLD 肝腦病變管理建議，乳果糖過度腹瀉可致電解質失衡並誘發腦病惡化。正解通報低鈉低鉀、評估腹膜炎徵象、並記錄神經學與氨值相關性。選項B自行加量可能脱水與電解質崩潰。選項D自由水在低鈉時危險。

A.en: Diarrheal losses from lactulose can worsen hyponatremia and require prescriber adjustment of dose or adjunct rifaximin.
A.zh: 乳果糖腹瀉流失可惡化低鈉，需醫師調整劑量或併用 rifaximin。

B.en: Empiric lactulose stacking risks profound hypokalemia when K⁺ is already 3.0 mEq/L.
B.zh: 在 K⁺ 已 3.0 mEq/L 時堆疊乳果糖，低鉀風險極高。

C.en: New distension with diarrhea raises spontaneous bacterial peritonitis suspicion needing exam documentation.
C.zh: 腹瀉合併新腹脹需警覺自發性細菌性腹膜炎並記錄理學檢查。

D.en: Hypotonic fluid encouragement contradicts sodium 128 mEq/L management goals.
D.zh: 血鈉 128 時鼓勵低張補液與治療目標相反。

E.en: Neurologic trending links ammonia fluctuations to therapy efficacy beyond stool count alone.
E.zh: 神經學趨勢可把氨值變化與療效連結，非只看排便次數。

usTwDifference: 台灣肝硬化門診常由消化科追蹤氨值；美國部分醫院已少用例行氨檢，護理觀察腹脹與意識仍關鍵。

stem: A patient with polymyalgia rheumatica receives prednisone 15 mg daily. Two weeks later fasting glucose 198 mg/dL, BP 148/92 mmHg, weight +3 kg, complains of facial rounding. CXR clear, no infection symptoms.
stemZh: 風濕性多發性肌痛病人每日 prednisone 15 mg。兩週後空腹血糖 198 mg/dL、BP 148/92 mmHg、體重增加 3 kg、主訴臉圓。胸部 X 光清晰、無感染症狀。
optionA: Ignore glucose because steroids always cause harmless hyperglycemia
optionB: Report glucocorticoid-induced hyperglycemia and hypertension to rheumatology for dosing review and coordinate glucose monitoring orders
optionC: Stop prednisone abruptly today to fix the blood sugar
optionD: Start metformin 1000 mg BID without provider orders
explanationZh: 依據 EULAR 巨細胞動脈炎與 PMR 糖皮質固醇毒性監測建議，新發高血糖與血壓上升需回報以調整類固醇或併用代謝藥物。正解通報專科並安排監測醫囑。選項A忽略可持續伤害。選項C驟停可能腎上腺危象。選項D未醫囑開藥違規。

A.en: Persistent fasting glucose near 200 mg/dL merits intervention even when steroids are indicated for rheumatic disease.
A.zh: 即使風濕病需要類固醇，空腹血糖近 200 仍需處置。

B.en: Specialty teams balance inflammatory control with metabolic surveillance and may add antihyperglycemics.
B.zh: 專科可在發炎控制與代謝監測間平衡，必要時加降血糖藥。

C.en: Abrupt cessation after two weeks of therapy risks adrenal insufficiency and disease flare.
C.zh: 兩週治療後突然停藥有腎上腺功能不足與疾病反彈風險。

D.en: Metformin initiation requires renal review and orders when steroid-induced diabetes emerges.
D.zh: 類固醇性糖尿病起始 metformin 需腎功能審核與醫囑。

usTwDifference: 台灣門診類固醇常由風濕免疫科開立；美國基層醫師追蹤較多，護理通報代謝副作用原則相同。

stem: A patient with atrial fibrillation on dabigatran 150 mg BID needs emergent ORIF for open ankle fracture. Last dose 8 hours ago. eGFR 72 mL/min, hemoglobin 11.0 g/dL, platelets 210 ×10³/µL, INR not applicable.
stemZh: 心房顫動病人服用 dabigatran 150 mg BID，因開放性踝骨折需緊急 ORIF。最後一劑在 8 小時前。eGFR 72 mL/min、血色素 11.0 g/dL、血小板 210 ×10³/µL、INR 不適用。
optionA: Withhold the anticoagulant facts from anesthesia to avoid case cancellation
optionB: Communicate exact dabigatran timing to surgery, anesthesia, and pharmacy so reversal planning follows institutional bleeding protocol
optionC: Administer idarucizumab 5 g on your own before consent is signed
optionD: Give vitamin K 10 mg IV to reverse dabigatran
explanationZh: 依據 ACCP 周手術期抗凝管理摘要，直接口服抗凝病人緊急手術需團隊知道最後服藥時間以決定 idarucizumab 等處置。正解完整傳遞資訊給手術、麻醉與藥劑。選項A隱匿資訊危及安全。選項C解毒劑需醫囑與同意。選項K對 DOAC 無效。

A.en: Concealing DOAC timing removes the opportunity for guideline-concordant reversal and intraoperative blood product planning.
A.zh: 隱瞞 DOAC 時程會失去依指引逆轉與術中血品準備的機會。

B.en: Interprofessional communication triggers reversal agent checks and timed redosing decisions.
B.zh: 跨專業溝通可啟動解毒劑核對與再給藥時程。

C.en: Idarucizumab requires physician orders, informed consent context, and post-reversal coagulation monitoring.
C.zh: idarucizumab 需醫師醫囑、同意背景與逆轉後凝血監測。

D.en: Vitamin K does not antagonize direct thrombin inhibition.
D.zh: 維生素K無法拮抗直接凝血酶抑制。

usTwDifference: 台灣 idarucizumab 存量多在醫學中心藥局；美國創傷中心常備，護理傳遞最後服藥時間仍屬關鍵。

stem: A patient with schizophrenia on paliperidone palmitate 117 mg IM monthly develops torticollis and oculogyric crisis 36 hours after injection. BP 132/84 mmHg, HR 104 bpm, temp 37.2°C, denies fever or rigidity elsewhere.
stemZh: 精神分裂症病人 36 小時前接受 paliperidone palmitate 117 mg IM 每月針劑，出現斜頸與眼球上轉危象。BP 132/84 mmHg、HR 104 bpm、體溫 37.2°C，否認發燒或其他僵硬。
optionA: Apply a neck brace only and schedule psychiatry next week
optionB: Notify psychiatry or emergency services about acute dystonia from antipsychotic exposure and anticipate ordered anticholinergic rescue
optionC: Administer another antipsychotic IM to relax muscles
optionD: Tell the patient this is a permanent stroke without assessment
explanationZh: 依據 APA 抗精神病藥急性運動障礙處置要點，急性肌張力不全需快速給予抗膽鹼藥物並評估藥物因果。正解通報精神科或急診取得 benztropine 等醫囑。選項A延誤可逆病變。選項C再加多巴胺拮抗劑惡化。選項D錯誤診斷造成恐慌。

A.en: Orthopedic immobilization does not reverse dopamine blockade-induced dystonia.
A.zh: 固定頸部無法逆轉多巴胺拮抗引起的肌張力不全。

B.en: Timely anticholinergics resolve oculogyric crisis while psychiatry evaluates depot adjustments.
B.zh: 及時抗膽鹼藥可解除眼球危象，精神科再評估長效針劑。

C.en: Additional antipsychotic worsens extrapyramidal symptoms in acute dystonic reaction.
C.zh: 急性張力不全反應時再加抗精神病藥會惡化錐體外症狀。

D.en: Labeling stroke without imaging misleads the patient and delays appropriate therapy.
D.zh: 未影像即稱中風會誤導病人並延誤正確治療。

usTwDifference: 台灣長效針多在門診注射；美國社區精神中心常備急救藥，護理辨識急性張力不全反應原則相同。

stem: A patient with iron deficiency receives ferrous sulfate 325 mg TID between meals. Black stools are reported, but today hemoglobin drops from 9.8 to 7.4 g/dL in 48 hours. BP 108/68 mmHg, HR 118 bpm, orthostatic dizziness, NG aspirate coffee-ground.
stemZh: 缺鐵性貧血病人餐間服用 ferrous sulfate 325 mg TID。解黑便，但 48 小時內血色素由 9.8 降至 7.4 g/dL。BP 108/68 mmHg、HR 118 bpm、姿位性暈眩，鼻胃管抽吸呈咖啡渣樣。
optionA: Hold oral iron and notify the provider about suspected upper GI bleed versus iron discoloration
optionB: Increase ferrous sulfate to QID to rebuild hemoglobin faster
optionC: Maintain two large-bore IV lines and prepare for possible transfusion per massive transfusion protocol activation criteria
optionD: Tell the patient black stool always means iron therapy is working
optionE: Monitor serial hemoglobin, lactate if ordered, and mental status for hypoperfusion
explanationZh: 依據 ACG 上消化道出血指引，急性失血時口服鐵劑無效且可能影響內視鏡視野。正解停鐵劑、通報出血、建立大孔徑管路並監測灌流指標。選項B口服鐵無法急救大出血。選項D把咖啡渣抽吸誤解為單純鐵劑染色屬危險。

A.en: Rapid hemoglobin fall with coffee-ground aspirate indicates mucosal bleeding beyond iron-staining stool.
A.zh: 血色素快速下降合併咖啡渣抽吸，顯示黏膜出血而非僅鐵劑染色便。

B.en: Oral iron cannot replace volume resuscitation when HR is 118 bpm with orthostasis.
B.zh: 心率 118 且姿位症狀時，口服鐵無法取代容量復甦。

C.en: Large-bore access supports rapid blood product administration if hemoglobin crosses transfusion thresholds.
C.zh: 大孔徑管路可在達輸血閾值時快速給血。

D.en: Melena from iron does not produce hemoglobin drop of 2.4 g/dL in two days with coffee-ground aspirate.
D.zh: 單純鐵劑所致黑便不會兩天降血色素 2.4 g/dL 且抽吸咖啡渣。

E.en: Lactate and cognition track occult hypoperfusion during ongoing GI hemorrhage.
E.zh: 乳酸與意識可追蹤腸胃道出血中的隱性低灌流。

usTwDifference: 台灣急診輸血行政流程較繁；美國創傷與 GI 出血大量輸血協議普及度不同，護理建立路徑原則相同。

stem: A patient with partial seizures receives lacosamide 200 mg BID. New ECG shows PR interval 280 ms without symptoms. K⁺ 4.0 mEq/L, Mg²⁺ 2.0 mg/dL, HR 58 bpm, BP 122/70 mmHg.
stemZh: 部分癲癇病人服用 lacosamide 200 mg BID。新心電圖 PR 280 ms 無症狀。K⁺ 4.0 mEq/L、Mg²⁺ 2.0 mg/dL、HR 58 bpm、BP 122/70 mmHg。
optionA: Continue the drug because the patient feels fine
optionB: Notify neurology and cardiology about PR prolongation on lacosamide and hold further doses until reviewed
