optionC: Keep NPO pending imaging or decompression orders and establish IV access for dextrose if hypoglycemia persists
optionD: Administer metoclopramide 10 mg IV without checking for contraindications
optionE: Monitor for aspiration with head-of-bed elevation and oral care
explanationZh: 依據 ADA 胃輕癱與營養支持建議，持續嘔吐與低血糖需禁食評估阻塞或毛石，並防吸入。正解通報專科、禁食建立靜脈、抬高床頭口腔護理。選項B再進食加重嘔吐。選項D metoclopramide 有禁忌需醫師評估。

A.en: Undigested food retention raises bezoar and obstruction concerns needing endoscopy planning.
A.zh: 食物滞留提高毛石與阻塞疑慮，需內視鏡計畫。

B.en: Additional feeding increases emesis risk with poor gastric motility.
B.zh: 胃動力差時再餵食增加嘔吐風險。

C.en: NPO status with IV dextrose orders stabilizes glucose while diagnostics proceed.
C.zh: 禁食合併靜脈葡萄糖醫囑可在檢查期穩定血糖。

D.en: Metoclopramide requires contraindication screening for long QT or Parkinson disease.
D.zh: metoclopramide 需排除 QT 延長或巴金森等禁忌。

E.en: Head elevation reduces aspiration when recurrent vomiting continues.
E.zh: 床頭抬高可減少反覆嘔吐的吸入風險。

usTwDifference: 台灣糖尿病胃輕癱常以中醫或促動藥併用；美國胃電刺激較多討論，禁食與吸入防護原則相同。

stem: A 16-year-old athlete collapses in heat; core temp 40.8°C, HR 168 bpm, BP 88/50 mmHg, agitated then combative, creatinine 1.4 mg/dL, glucose 180 mg/dL.
stemZh: 16 歲運動員熱環境中倒下，核心體溫 40.8°C、HR 168 bpm、BP 88/50 mmHg、躁動後好鬥，creatinine 1.4 mg/dL、血糖 180 mg/dL。
optionA: Give antipyretic acetaminophen first
optionB: Initiate rapid active cooling with ice water immersion or evaporation strategy per NATA exertional heat stroke protocol
optionC: Wrap in blankets to stop shivering
optionD: Wait for spontaneous cooling while walking laps
explanationZh: 依據 NATA 勞性熱中暑處置建議，核心溫超過 40°C 伴中樞神經異常需積極降溫勝過藥物退燒。正解冰水浸浴或等效積極降溫。選項A乙醯胺酚不治療熱調節衰竭。選項C包覆保温惡化高熱。選項D活動增加產熱。

A.en: Antipyretics target hypothalamic cytokine fever, not heat-dissipation failure.
A.zh: 退燒藥作用於細胞激素熱，不處理散熱衰竭。

B.en: Cold water immersion maximizes conductive heat loss during neurologic deterioration.
B.zh: 冰水浸浴在神經惡化時最大化傳導散熱。

C.en: Blankets trap metabolic heat in classic heat stroke.
C.zh: 毯子會困住典型熱中暑的代謝熱。

D.en: Exercise generates additional heat when thermoregulation has failed.
D.zh: 體溫調節已失效時運動會再產熱。

usTwDifference: 台灣校園運動防熱政策仍在推廣；美國高中冰浴設備較多，急救降溫原則相同。

stem: A 70-year-old with CKD has sudden pleuritic chest pain after long car ride. HR 118 bpm, BP 100/66 mmHg, SpO₂ 91% on 2 L, RR 24/min, unilateral leg swelling 3 cm larger calf.
stemZh: 70 歲慢性腎病病人長途搭車後突然肋膜性胸痛。HR 118 bpm、BP 100/66 mmHg、2 L 氧氣下 SpO₂ 91%、RR 24 次/分，單側小腿腫脹較對側大 3 cm。
optionA: Massage both calves to relieve stiffness
optionB: Activate emergency evaluation for pulmonary embolism physiology and anticipate imaging per ESC acute PE risk stratification
optionC: Give aspirin 325 mg only and discharge
optionD: Ignore leg swelling if chest pain improves with deep breathing
explanationZh: 依據 ESC 急性肺栓塞診斷指引，低血壓趨勢、缺氧與單側腫脹屬高風險表現。正解啟動急診評估與影像。選項A按摩可能促使血栓移動。選項C僅阿斯匹靈不足以治療 PE。選項D忽略肢體徵象延誤診斷。

A.en: Calf massage can embolize thrombus lodged after venous stasis travel.
A.zh: 按摩小腿可能使靜脈淤積後的血栓栓塞。

B.en: Emergency pathways expedite CTA or V/Q imaging when pretest probability is high.
B.zh: 急診路徑可在驗前機率高時加速 CTA 或 V/Q 影像。

C.en: Aspirin monotherapy does not provide therapeutic anticoagulation for suspected PE.
C.zh: 單用阿斯匹靈無法達到疑似 PE 的治療性抗凝。

D.en: Fluctuating pleuritic pain does not exclude massive embolism with occult hypotension.
D.zh: 肋膜痛起伏不能排除大量栓塞合併隱性低血壓。

usTwDifference: 台灣急診 D-dimer 解讀在腎病人需調整閾值；美國 YEARS 演算法普及，臨床警覺原則相同。

stem: A 55-year-old with cirrhosis has hematemesis 200 mL, BP 94/60 mmHg, HR 118 bpm, Hgb 8.2 g/dL, INR 1.6, platelets 78 ×10³/µL, lactate 3.0 mmol/L, confused to time.
stemZh: 55 歲肝硬化病人吐血約 200 mL，BP 94/60 mmHg、HR 118 bpm、血色素 8.2 g/dL、INR 1.6、血小板 78 ×10³/µL、lactate 3.0 mmol/L、時間定向障礙。
optionA: Establish two large-bore IV lines and prepare blood products per massive transfusion activation criteria
optionB: Give lactulose enema before any airway assessment
optionC: Keep NPO and elevate head of bed to reduce aspiration risk
optionD: Encourage oral NSAIDs for pain
optionE: Notify gastroenterology for urgent endoscopy planning in variceal physiology
explanationZh: 依據 AASLD 肝硬化急性消化道出血處置建議，血流動力學不穩需大孔徑輸液與備血，並安排內視鏡。正解建立路徑、頭高位防吸入、通知消化科。選項B在氣道未評估前灌腸可能吸入。選項D NSAID 惡化出血與腎灌流。

A.en: Variceal hemorrhage can exsanguinate rapidly; large-bore access supports resuscitation.
A.zh: 靜脈曲張出血可快速失血，大孔徑管路支持復甦。

B.en: Enemas before protecting airway risk aspiration in altered mental status.
B.zh: 意識障礙未保護氣道前灌腸有吸入風險。

C.en: Head elevation reduces passive regurgitation of blood into the airway.
C.zh: 頭高位減少血液被動逆流至氣道。

D.en: NSAIDs impair platelet function and renal autoregulation during shock.
D.zh: 休克時 NSAID 抑制血小板與腎自動調節。

E.en: Early endoscopy banding or sclerotherapy addresses portal hypertension bleeding.
E.zh: 早期內視鏡結扎或硬化可治療門脈高壓出血。

usTwDifference: 台灣夜班內視鏡人力有限；美國創傷與消化科 MTP 啟動較制式，護理備血原則相同。

stem: A 29-year-old with myasthenic crisis is intubated day 2, ventilator high pressure alarms, absent breath sounds left, trachea midline, SpO₂ 88%, HR 122 bpm, BP 96/60 mmHg.
stemZh: 29 歲肌無力危象病人插管第 2 天，呼吸器高壓警報、左側呼吸音消失、氣管居中、SpO₂ 88%、HR 122 bpm、BP 96/60 mmHg。
optionA: Increase sedation only
optionB: Disconnect for manual bag assessment, call RT/MD for mainstem intubation or mucus plug causing one-lung ventilation per AACN airway monitoring
optionC: Deflate cuff fully and extubate at bedside
optionD: Turn FiO₂ to 21% to test oxygen toxicity
explanationZh: 依據 AACN 機械通氣病人監測標準，單側呼吸音消失合併高壓需鑑別主支氣管插管或痰栓。正解脫離回路手動通氣評估並通知呼吸治療與醫師。選項A鎮靜無法解除物理阻塞。選項C盲目拔管致命。選項D降氧惡化低氧。

A.en: Sedation does not reposition an endotracheal tube lodged in the right mainstem.
A.zh: 鎮靜無法 reposition 滑入右主支氣管的氣管內管。

B.en: Manual ventilation and bronchoscopy readiness clarify tube depth versus mucus plugging.
B.zh: 手動通氣與準備支氣管鏡可釐清管深或痰栓。

C.en: Unplanned extubation during hypoxemia risks immediate arrest.
C.zh: 低氧時計畫外拔管有立即心跳停止風險。

D.en: Room air trials during acute desaturation are unsafe troubleshooting steps.
D.zh: 急性血氧下降時試室氣屬不安全排查。

usTwDifference: 台灣 ICU RT 人力不如美國充足；美國床邊纖維支氣管鏡較可及，氣道異常通報原則相同。

stem: A 40-year-old with pheochromocytoma resection scheduled develops episodic headache, BP 210/120 mmHg, HR 128 bpm, diaphoresis, glucose 210 mg/dL, temp 37.1°C.
stemZh: 40 歲嗜鉻細胞瘤切除術前病人出現陣發性頭痛、BP 210/120 mmHg、HR 128 bpm、盜汗、血糖 210 mg/dL、體溫 37.1°C。
optionA: Give beta blocker alone first
optionB: Notify anesthesia and surgery about catecholamine surge and anticipate alpha-blockade-first strategy per Endocrine Society perioperative guidelines
optionC: Encourage vigorous exercise to burn catecholamines
optionD: Start high-dose insulin sliding scale only
explanationZh: 依據 Endocrine Society 嗜鉻細胞瘤術前準備建議，未先阻斷 alpha 即給 beta 阻斷可能反彈性高血壓危象。正解通知手術麻醉團隊依序給藥。選項A單用乙型阻斷危險。選項C運動誘發危象。選項D胰島素未處理血管收縮危機。

A.en: Beta blockade before alpha blockade permits unopposed vasoconstriction.
A.zh: alpha 阻斷前先用乙型阻斷會使血管收縮無對抗。

B.en: Team notification ensures phenoxybenzamine or phentolamine sequencing before surgery.
B.zh: 團隊通知可確保手術前 phenoxybenzamine 或 phentolamine 順序。

C.en: Exercise triggers catecholamine release from the tumor.
C.zh: 運動會刺激腫瘤釋放兒茶酚胺。

D.en: Insulin does not abort hypertensive emergencies driven by catecholamine excess.
D.zh: 胰島素無法中止兒茶酚胺過量的高血壓急症。

usTwDifference: 台灣嗜鉻細胞瘤多由外科與內分泌共治；美國術前藥物選擇相似，alpha 優先原則相同。

stem: A 6-month-old with bronchiolitis has RR 62/min, nasal flaring, SpO₂ 89% on room air, temp 37.9°C, feeding 50% usual, cap refill 2 seconds.
stemZh: 6 個月大細支氣管炎，RR 62 次/分、鼻翼搧動、室氣 SpO₂ 89%、體溫 37.9°C、奶量為平常 50%、微血管回充 2 秒。
optionA: Apply nasal suctioning and trial of hypertonic saline nebulizer if ordered per AAP bronchiolitis management
optionB: Give routine antibiotics for viral wheeze
optionC: Offer smaller frequent feeds and monitor hydration markers
optionD: Use antitussive cough syrup OTC
optionE: Trend RR and SpO₂ hourly until stable
explanationZh: 依據 AAP 細支氣管炎處置建議，支持性照護為主，必要時抽痰與高張鹽水需醫囑，並監測呼吸與氧合與進食量。選項B病毒性疾病常規抗生素不當。選項D止咳藥在嬰兒有安全疑慮。

A.en: Clearing nasal passages improves oxygenation in obligate nasal breathers.
A.zh: 清除鼻腔可改善必經鼻呼吸者的氧合。

B.en: Antibiotics do not shorten viral bronchiolitis without bacterial coinfection evidence.
B.zh: 無細菌共感染證據時抗生素不縮短病毒性細支氣管炎病程。

C.en: Frequent small feeds maintain caloric intake when tachypnea interrupts suck-swallow-breathe coordination.
C.zh: 呼吸急促打斷吸吮吞嚥協調時，少量多餐可維持熱量。

D.en: OTC antitussives lack efficacy and carry toxicity risk in infants.
D.zh: 嬰兒用成藥止咳缺乏效益且有毒性風險。

E.en: Serial vitals detect apnea or fatigue before arrest in young infants.
E.zh: 連續生命徵象可在嬰兒呼吸中止前偵測呼吸疲勞。

usTwDifference: 台灣急診對細支氣管炎抗生素使用率仍偏高；美國強調支持療法，監測原則相同。

stem: A 45-year-old with ARPKD has sudden flank pain, Hgb drop 11 to 8 g/dL in 6 hours, BP 148/92 mmHg, HR 110 bpm, creatinine 2.4 mg/dL baseline 2.0, denies trauma.
stemZh: 45 歲體染色體隱性多囊腎病人突發腰痛，6 小時內血色素由 11 降至 8 g/dL、BP 148/92 mmHg、HR 110 bpm、creatinine 基準 2.0 現為 2.4，否認外傷。
optionA: Apply heating pads and discharge with NSAIDs
optionB: Notify nephrology about cyst hemorrhage physiology and anticipate imaging or transfusion thresholds per KDIGO ADPKD complication care
optionC: Start high-intensity anticoagulation empirically
optionD: Ignore creatinine bump as chronic baseline fluctuation only
explanationZh: 依據 KDIGO 多囊腎併發症照護重點，急性血色素下降合併腰痛需評估囊腫出血與輸血需求。正解通知腎科安排影像與監測。選項A NSAID 惡化腎功能與出血。選項C未證實血栓即抗凝不當。選項D忽略急性腎傷害趨勢。

A.en: NSAIDs impair renal perfusion in polycystic kidneys with acute hemorrhage risk.
A.zh: 多囊腎急性出血風險下 NSAID 降低腎灌流。

B.en: CT or ultrasound guides transfusion and embolization decisions during cyst rupture.
B.zh: 電腦斷層或超音波可在囊腫破裂時指引輸血或栓塞。

C.en: Empiric anticoagulation worsens bleeding without proven thrombosis.
C.zh: 未證實血栓即抗凝會加重出血。

D.en: Creatinine rise with anemia suggests obstructive or hypoxic injury beyond baseline CKD.
D.zh: 貧血合併肌酸酐上升提示超越基準 CKD 的阻塞或缺氧傷害。

usTwDifference: 台灣多囊腎病人腎替代療法等待時間長；美國托伐普坦使用較多，急性出血通報原則相同。

stem: A 60-year-old with amyloid light-chain disease and nephrotic range proteinuria develops orthopnea, JVD 12 cm, S3 gallop, BP 98/70 mmHg, SpO₂ 90% on 3 L, BNP 1100 pg/mL, albumin 2.0 g/dL.
stemZh: 60 歲輕鏈型類澱粉沉積合併腎病症候群範圍蛋白尿，發生端坐呼吸、JVD 12 cm、S3 奔馬律、BP 98/70 mmHg、3 L 下 SpO₂ 90%、BNP 1100 pg/mL、albumin 2.0 g/dL。
optionA: Sit upright and notify hematology about restrictive cardiomyopathy physiology with volume overload
optionB: Give rapid IV albumin without diuretic plan
optionC: Monitor strict I/O and daily weights for third-spacing versus congestion
optionD: Assume BNP is falsely high solely from renal failure without exam correlation
optionE: Prepare for possible diuretic or dialysis ultrafiltration orders after provider evaluation
explanationZh: 依據 ESC 心臟類澱粉沉積指引，限制性生理合併腎病症候群常需謹慎利尿與超篩。正解坐姿、紀錄出入量體重、並準備醫師指示的利尿或透析超滤。選項B單純白蛋白無排液計畫可能加重肺水腫。選項D忽略理學與臨床關聯。

A.en: Upright posture reduces preload in stiff ventricles with elevated filling pressures.
A.zh: 坐姿可降低僵硬心室且充盈壓升高的前負荷。

B.en: Albumin infusion without diuresis can expand plasma volume worsening pulmonary edema.
B.zh: 未利尿即輸白蛋白可擴張血漿容積惡化肺水腫。

C.en: I/O trends separate nephrotic edema from cardiac congestion needing different therapies.
C.zh: 出入量趨勢可區分腎病症候群水腫與心因充血。

D.en: BNP elevation still correlates with symptomatic heart failure even in renal dysfunction when exam supports congestion.
D.zh: 即使腎功能差，理學支持充血時 BNP 仍與症狀性衰竭相關。

E.en: Gentle diuresis or UF may be ordered when perfusion tolerates fluid removal.
E.zh: 灌流可承受時可醫囑緩和利尿或超濾。

usTwDifference: 台灣心臟類澱粉診斷常延遲；美國 TTR 基因檢測普及度較高，症狀處置原則相同。

stem: A 25-year-old with T1DM exercises vigorously; glucose 52 mg/dL, sweaty, tremulous, still oriented. Last insulin glargine 12 units this morning, last bolus 3 units 4 hours ago.
stemZh: 25 歲第一型糖尿病病人劇烈運動後血糖 52 mg/dL、冒汗顫抖、定向力仍正常。今早胰島素 glargine 12 units、4 小時前餐前 bolus 3 units。
optionA: Tell the patient to keep running to burn glucose
optionB: Administer 15 g fast carbohydrate and recheck glucose in 15 minutes per ADA hypoglycemia treatment algorithm
optionC: Give glucagon 1 mg IM for mild awake symptoms
optionD: Hold all basal insulin forever
explanationZh: 依據 ADA 低血糖處置規則-15-15 原則，清醒可吞嚥者先給快速醣類並複測。正解依算法補糖追蹤。選項A運動加深低血糖。選項C glucagon 保留給嚴重或無法口服情境。選項D永久停基礎胰島素不當。

A.en: Continued exertion depletes hepatic glycogen during insulin excess.
A.zh: 持續運動在胰島素過量時耗盡肝醣。

B.en: Measured carbohydrate treats neuroglycopenia while preventing rebound hyperglycemia from overfeeding.
B.zh: 定量醣類可治療神經低血糖又避免過量進食反彈高血糖。

C.en: Glucagon is reserved for unconscious patients or when oral intake fails.
C.zh: glucagon 保留給意識障礙或無法口服者。

D.en: Basal insulin adjustments require pattern review, not permanent cessation after one episode.
D.zh: 基礎胰島素需型態檢討，不因單次事件永久停用。

usTwDifference: 台灣運動血糖衛教在門診時間有限；美國 CGM 普及較高，15-15 規則概念相同。

stem: Eight hours after a total thyroidectomy, the patient develops stridor, soft neck swelling, voice muffled. BP 142/88 mmHg, HR 96 bpm, SpO₂ 92% on 4 L, drain output 80 mL serosanguineous last hour, calcium ionized 1.12 mmol/L.
stemZh: 全甲狀腺切除術後 8 小時出現喘鳴、頸部軟組織腫脹、聲音含糊。BP 142/88 mmHg、HR 96 bpm、4 L 氧氣下 SpO₂ 92%、引流管上一小時 80 mL 血清血性、離子鈣 1.12 mmol/L。
optionA: Give ice chips only and reassess in the morning
optionB: Notify surgery immediately about possible neck hematoma airway compromise and prepare for emergent opening per ATA postoperative complication guidance
optionC: Increase calcium gluconate only because ionized calcium is borderline
optionD: Remove the drain to decompress the neck
explanationZh: 依據 ATA 甲狀腺術後併發症處置，進行性喘鳴與頸圍增加屬外科急症，可能為血腫壓迫氣道。正解即刻通知外科並準備床邊減壓。選項A延誤窒息。選項C低鈣非此時主要矛盾。選項D非護理可擅自拔管且可能無法解除深部出血。

A.en: Airway compression from expanding hematoma progresses faster than daylight staffing cycles.
A.zh: 擴張血腫壓迫氣道進展快於白天人力班表。

B.en: Surgical evacuation or suture line inspection reverses obstructive physiology threatening oxygenation.
B.zh: 外科清除或縫線檢查可逆轉危及氧合的阻塞生理。

C.en: Mild hypocalcemia does not explain acute stridor with external neck fullness after thyroidectomy.
C.zh: 輕度低鈣無法解釋術後急性喘鳴合併頸部飽滿。

D.en: Drain removal without imaging may lose monitoring of ongoing hemorrhage and does not replace surgical exploration.
D.zh: 未影像即拔引流管可能失去出血監測，也無法取代外科探查。

usTwDifference: 台灣甲狀腺手術多在醫學中心；美國門診甲狀腺切除後觀察模式不同，氣道警訊通報原則相同。

stem: A 30-year-old with DKA has insulin infusion running, glucose now 210 mg/dL, K⁺ 3.0 mEq/L, pH 7.28, anion gap 14, mental status clear, BP 118/72 mmHg.
stemZh: 30 歲糖尿病酮酸中毒病人胰島素輸注進行中，血糖 210 mg/dL、K⁺ 3.0 mEq/L、pH 7.28、陰離子間隙 14、意識清楚、BP 118/72 mmHg。
optionA: Notify the provider that closing anion gap with hypokalemia requires potassium replacement before stopping insulin
optionB: Stop insulin now because glucose is below 250 mg/dL
optionC: Continue cardiac monitoring during potassium repletion
optionD: Give rapid insulin bolus to drive potassium into cells faster without replacement
optionE: Recheck BMP per protocol after replacement begins
explanationZh: 依據 ADA DKA 處置流程，陰離子間隙接近正常但血鉀偏低時，胰島素會使鉀進入細胞而惡化低鉀。正解在醫師指示下先補鉀並持續監測心電與實驗室。選項B驟停胰島素可能酮體反彈。選項D再加胰島素未補鉀可致心律不整。

A.en: Potassium must be repleted to ≥3.3 mEq/L before aggressive insulin continuation per consensus algorithms.
A.zh: 依共識流程，積極續用胰島素前鉀需補至安全下限。

B.en: Stopping insulin while ketosis may recur risks rebound acidosis despite normalized glucose.
B.zh: 酮症可能復發時停胰島素，即使血糖正常也有酸中毒反彈風險。

C.en: Telemetry catches T-wave changes during rapid potassium shifts.
C.zh: 心電監測可捕捉快速鉀移動時的 T 波變化。

D.en: Additional insulin without repletion worsens intracellular shift hypokalemia.
D.zh: 未補鉀再加胰島素會惡化細胞內移造成的低鉀。

E.en: Serial BMP confirms safe potassium before transitioning to subcutaneous insulin.
E.zh: 連續 BMP 可確認轉皮下胰島素前的安全血鉀。

usTwDifference: 台灣急診 DKA 路徑表格式不一；美國醫院常內建胰島素與鉀協議，監測邏輯相同。

stem: A 55-year-old with cirrhosis has sudden hemodynamic instability after large-volume paracentesis 8 L removed 1 hour ago. BP 86/50 mmHg, HR 118 bpm, creatinine 1.9 mg/dL from 1.2, peripheral pallor, denies bleeding per rectum.
stemZh: 55 歲肝硬化病人大量放腹水 1 小時內移除 8 L 後突然血流動力學不穩。BP 86/50 mmHg、HR 118 bpm、creatinine 由 1.2 升至 1.9 mg/dL、四肢蒼白，否認肛門出血。
optionA: Repeat paracentesis immediately to remove more fluid
optionB: Notify hepatology about post-paracentesis circulatory dysfunction and anticipate albumin expansion per AASLD large-volume paracentesis protocol
optionC: Give furosemide 80 mg IV push to diurese
optionD: Place in Trendelenburg for 8 hours without further workup
explanationZh: 依據 AASLD 大量放腹水指引，快速移除大量腹水可致有效循環血量驟降。正解通報並依醫囑給白蛋白等擴容。選項A再放液惡化低血壓。選項C利尿劑與目標相反。選項D姿位無法取代膠體復甦。

A.en: Further paracentesis without volume expansion deepens arterial underfilling.
A.zh: 未先容積擴張再放液會加深動脈灌流不足。

B.en: Albumin infusion after large-volume taps restores oncotic pressure and renal perfusion.
B.zh: 大量放液後白蛋白輸注可恢復膠體壓與腎灌流。

C.en: Loop diuretics reduce intravascular volume when creatinine is already rising post-procedure.
C.zh: 術後肌酸酐上升時再用袢利尿劑會降低血管內容積。

D.en: Trendelenburg does not replace colloid resuscitation in hepatorenal physiology.
D.zh: 頭低腳高無法取代肝腎生理下的膠體復甦。

usTwDifference: 台灣白蛋白給付審核嚴；美國急診放腹水後白蛋白較常規，病理生理處置概念相同。

stem: A 48-hour-old infant has bilirubin 11 mg/dL, breastfeeding <8 times/day, 8% weight loss, urine dark yellow, mother’s milk not fully in. HR 168, temp 36.8°C, alert.
stemZh: 出生 48 小時嬰兒膽紅素 11 mg/dL，哺乳每日少於 8 次、體重下降 8%、尿液深黃、母奶尚未順利建立。HR 168、體溫 36.8°C、警覺。
optionA: Discharge if the baby looks pink
optionB: Coordinate lactation support and pediatric reassessment for inadequate intake hyperbilirubinemia per AAP breastfeeding and jaundice guidance
optionC: Give water bottles between feeds to dilute bilirubin
optionD: Stop all feeds for 24 hours
explanationZh: 依據 AAP 哺乳與黃疸衛教，攝入不足導致熱量與排便減少會加重膽紅素腸肝循環。正解強化哺餵支持並安排兒科複評。選項A忽略體重與尿色警訊。選項C水分無熱量且可能低鈉。選項D禁食惡化脱水與酮症。

A.en: Pink skin does not exclude dangerous unconjugated bilirubin rise with poor intake.
A.zh: 皮膚粉紅無法排除攝入不良時未結合膽紅素危險上升。

B.en: Lactation consults increase feeding frequency and stooling that clear bilirubin enterohepatically.
B.zh: 泌乳諮詢可提高哺乳頻率與排便，降低腸肝循環膽紅素。

C.en: Water feeds displace caloric milk and risk hyponatremia in neonates.
C.zh: 水分哺餵取代含熱量奶水，新生兒有低鈉風險。

D.en: Prolonged NPO worsens hyperbilirubinemia by reducing gut clearance.
D.zh: 長時間禁食因腸道清除下降而惡化高膽紅素。

usTwDifference: 台灣產後泌乳諮詢人力不足；美國 IBCLC 覆蓋較廣，攝入不足黃疸處置原則相同。

stem: A 70-year-old with CHF develops acute confusion overnight, Na⁺ 118 mEq/L, urine osmolality 450 mOsm/kg, urine sodium 18 mEq/L, euvolemic exam, taking desmopressin nightly for nocturia.
stemZh: 70 歲心衰竭病人隔夜急性意識混亂，Na⁺ 118 mEq/L、尿滲透壓 450 mOsm/kg、尿鈉 18 mEq/L、理學檢查容積狀態正常，每晚服用 desmopressin 治療夜尿。
optionA: Give 3% saline rapid bolus without orders
optionB: Hold desmopressin, notify provider about SIADH-like hyponatremia physiology, and prepare monitored correction per European hyponatremia guidelines
optionC: Restrict all sodium intake to fix confusion
optionD: Start DDAVP nasal spray to retain water
explanationZh: 依據 European Renal Association 低鈉指引，濃縮尿合併低血鈉需停用抗利尿激素作用藥物並由醫師規劃矯正速率。正解暫停 desmopressin 並通報。選項A未計算即高張鹽水有脫髓鞘風險。選項C限鈉對此機轉幫助有限。選項D再加藥惡化低鈉。

A.en: Hypertonic saline requires physician dosing and sodium monitoring to avoid osmotic demyelination.
A.zh: 高張鹽水需醫師劑量與鈉監測以避免滲透性脫髓鞘。

B.en: Stopping vasopressin analogs removes unregulated water retention driving symptomatic hyponatremia.
B.zh: 停用類升壓素藥物可移除不受控的水滞留驅動。

C.en: Dietary sodium restriction does not reverse excess free water retention from ADH activity.
C.zh: 限鈉無法逆轉 ADH 活性造成的自由水滞留。

D.en: Additional DDAVP worsens dilutional hyponatremia when urine is already concentrated.
D.zh: 尿液已濃縮時再加 DDAVP 會惡化稀释性低鈉。

usTwDifference: 台灣門診夜尿常用抗利尿激素類藥；美國處方監管較鬆，低鈉通報原則相同。

stem: A 40-year-old with acute pancreatitis develops fever 39.2°C, WBC 18 ×10³/µL, CT shows gas in pancreatic bed, BP 94/60 mmHg, lactate 3.8 mmol/L, glucose 210 mg/dL.
stemZh: 40 歲急性胰炎病人發燒 39.2°C、WBC 18 ×10³/µL，電腦斷層顯示胰周氣體、BP 94/60 mmHg、lactate 3.8 mmol/L、血糖 210 mg/dL。
optionA: Continue only NPO and acetaminophen
optionB: Escalate to surgery and infectious disease for necrotizing infected pancreatitis physiology per WSES sepsis pathways
optionC: Increase oral diet to boost immunity
optionD: Apply heating pad to pancreas region only
explanationZh: 依據 WSES 重症胰炎感染處置路徑，影像氣體合併敗血性休克前驅需外科與感染科介入。正解升級處置而非僅保守。選項A忽略壞死感染。選項C進食禁忌。選項D熱敷無法清除感染。

A.en: Conservative NPO care fails when gas-forming infection threatens sepsis.
A.zh: 氣體形成感染威脅敗血症時，單純禁食保守不足。

B.en: Surgical debridement or drainage aligns with infected necrosis physiology.
B.zh: 外科清創或引流符合感染性壞死生理。

C.en: Enteral stimulation during necrotizing infection risks bacterial translocation exacerbation.
C.zh: 壞死感染期刺激腸道可能加重細菌轉位。

D.en: Surface heat does not sterilize retroperitoneal gas collections.
D.zh: 表面熱無法滅菌後腹膜氣體聚積。

usTwDifference: 台灣胰周壞死介入放射引流逐步普及；美國外科清創較早討論，敗血症通報原則相同。

stem: A 28-year-old with asthma is intubated for hypercapnic coma. Initial ventilator ABG pH 7.18, PaCO₂ 88 mmHg, auto-PEEP suspected with prolonged expiratory flow. BP 110/70 mmHg, HR 120 bpm, SpO₂ 94%.
stemZh: 28 歲氣喘病人因高二氧化碳昏迷插管。初始呼吸器 ABG pH 7.18、PaCO₂ 88 mmHg，懷疑 auto-PEEP 且呼氣流延長。BP 110/70 mmHg、HR 120 bpm、SpO₂ 94%。
optionA: Notify respiratory therapy and provider to lengthen expiratory time and reduce air trapping
optionB: Increase respiratory rate to 35 to blow off CO₂ faster
optionC: Brief disconnect with manual ventilation only if ordered to relieve trapped gas during assessment
optionD: Add dead space to raise PaCO₂ therapeutically
optionE: Monitor blood pressure for pseudohypotension from intrathoracic pressure swings
explanationZh: 依據 ATS 嚴重氣喘機械通氣建議，動態過度充氣需延長呼氣時間與降低頻率，而非再加快RR。正解通知 RT/醫師調整設定，必要時短暫解除以評估，並監測胸內壓造成的血壓假象。選項B加快頻率惡化氣體陷閉。選項D提高二氧化碳與治療目標相反。

A.en: Lowering minute ventilation rate or I:E ratio reduces auto-PEEP in obstructed airways.
A.zh: 降低每分通氣或調 I:E 可減少阻塞氣道的 auto-PEEP。

B.en: Raising RR shortens expiratory time and worsens gas trapping.
B.zh: 提高 RR 縮短呼氣時間，惡化氣體陷閉。

C.en: Supervised disconnects can be diagnostic for catastrophic hyperinflation under physician direction.
C.zh: 在醫師指示下短暫斷接可診斷致命性過度膨脹。

D.en: Adding dead space retains CO₂ when the problem is failure to exhale, not hypocapnia.
D.zh: 問題是呼不出而非低碳酸時，加死腔會滞留二氧化碳。

E.en: High intrathoracic pressure falsely lowers BP readings until breath stacking resolves.
E.zh: 高胸內壓在氣體堆積未解前可假性降低血壓讀數。

usTwDifference: 台灣 ICU 對嚴重氣喘鎮静肌松使用保守；美國較早採用，調整呼氣時間原則相同。

stem: A 65-year-old with ESRD on hemodialysis thrice weekly misses Friday treatment. Sunday evening presents with pericardial rub, HR 52 bpm junctional on monitor, K⁺ 6.9 mEq/L, widened QRS, BP 142/88 mmHg.
stemZh: 65 歲末期腎病每週三次血液透析，錯過週五治療。週日晚上出現心包摩擦音、監視器交界節律 HR 52、K⁺ 6.9 mEq/L、QRS 變寬、BP 142/88 mmHg。
optionA: Give oral kayexalate only and recheck in clinic next week
optionB: Activate emergency dialysis and cardiac monitoring for hyperkalemic cardiotoxicity with uremic pericarditis per KDIGO acute hyperkalemia care
optionC: Exercise vigorously to redistribute potassium into muscle
optionD: Give insulin 10 units IV without glucose or monitoring
explanationZh: 依據 KDIGO 急性高鉀與尿毒症心包炎處置，寬 QRS 與緩脈屬立即降鉀與透析指標。正解啟動緊急透析與連續心電監測。選項A腸道降鉀太慢。選項C運動增加心律不整風險。選項D胰島素未搭配葡萄糖監測可能低血糖。

A.en: Exchange resins act over hours, not minutes, when QRS is widening.
A.zh: QRS 變寬時樹脂交換需數小時，非分鐘級。

B.en: Emergent dialysis removes potassium and uremic toxins driving conduction disease.
B.zh: 緊急透析可移除鉀與尿毒毒素，改善傳導異常。

C.en: Exercise stress can trigger fatal arrhythmias at K⁺ 6.9 mEq/L.
C.zh: K⁺ 6.9 時運動壓力可誘發致命心律不整。

D.en: Insulin shifts without concurrent glucose monitoring risks hypoglycemic seizures.
D.zh: 胰島素移鉀若未同步監測葡萄糖，有低血糖抽搐風險。

usTwDifference: 台灣假日透析機台排程緊張；美國透析中心週日班較多，寬 QRS 高鉀通報原則相同。

stem: A 50-year-old with obstructive sleep apnea on CPAP 12 cm H₂O gains 15 kg; spouse notes loud snoring returns, Epworth 16, morning headache, BP 152/94 mmHg, AHI on home sleep test 28/hour.
stemZh: 50 歲阻塞型睡眠呼吸中止病人使用 CPAP 12 cm H₂O，體重增加 15 kg，伴侶反映打鼾再起、Epworth 16、晨間頭痛、居家睡眠檢查 AHI 28/小時、BP 152/94 mmHg。
optionA: Stop CPAP because it is no longer needed
optionB: Refer to sleep medicine for pressure reassessment and weight management per AASM OSA long-term management guidance
optionC: Recommend sedatives for deeper sleep
optionD: Increase alcohol before bed to relax
explanationZh: 依據 AASM 睡眠呼吸中止長期管理建議，體重增加可改變上呼吸道順應性與壓力需求。正解轉介睡眠專科重新滴定與生活型態介入。選項A停用 CPAP 惡化心血管風險。選項C鎮靜加重氣道塌陷。選項D酒精鬆弛咽部肌肉。

A.en: Rising AHI after weight gain indicates therapy failure, not cure.
A.zh: 體重增加後 AHI 上升代表治療失效而非痊癒。

B.en: Retitration or alternative PAP modes restore nocturnal ventilation efficiency.
B.zh: 重新滴定或替代 PAP 模式可恢復夜間換氣效率。

C.en: Sedatives worsen upper airway tone during apnea episodes.
C.zh: 鎮靜劑在呼吸中止發作時降低上氣道張力。

D.en: Alcohol relaxes pharyngeal dilators and prolongs hypoxic events.
D.zh: 酒精鬆弛咽擴張肌並延長缺氧事件。

usTwDifference: 台灣睡眠中心等待久；美國居家自動滴定設備較多，長期追蹤原則相同。

stem: A 38-week pregnant patient reports decreased fetal movement 12 hours. FHR baseline 110 with absent variability for 40 minutes, no accelerations, BP 122/78 mmHg, uterus tense between contractions.
stemZh: 妊娠 38 週，孕婦 12 小時胎動減少。胎心率基線 110、40 分鐘變異消失、無加速、BP 122/78 mmHg、宮縮間歇子宮仍張力偏高。
optionA: Notify obstetrics immediately about possible fetal compromise physiology
optionB: Send the patient home to drink juice only
optionC: Prepare for emergent delivery evaluation including continuous monitoring per ACOG intrapartum fetal heart rate management
optionD: Delay assessment until morning clinic
optionE: Document contraction pattern, vaginal bleeding, and maternal vitals each reassessment
explanationZh: 依據 ACOG 產時胎心率監測指引，長時間變異消失合併張力過高需排除胎盤早剝與胎兒窘迫。正解即刻產科處置與連續監測，並完整紀錄。選項B果汁無法排除急性缺氧。選項D延誤可能胎死腹中。

A.en: Absent variability with concerning tone suggests placental insufficiency or abruption.
A.zh: 變異消失合併張力異常提示胎盤功能不足或早剝。

B.en: Oral glucose does not reverse chronic hypoxia patterns on tracing.
B.zh: 口服葡萄糖無法逆轉圖形上的慢性缺氧型態。

C.en: Emergent evaluation may lead to delivery when Category II patterns deteriorate.
C.zh: 緊急評估可在第二類圖形惡化時導向分娩。

D.en: Overnight delays ignore evolving fetal acidemia risk.
D.zh: 隔夜延誤忽略胎兒酸血症進展風險。

E.en: Structured documentation supports legal and clinical timelines during emergencies.
E.zh: 結構化紀錄可在急症中支持法律與臨床時序。

usTwDifference: 台灣產房護病比壓力大；美國胎心類別術語更新較頻繁，危急圖形通報原則相同。

stem: A 60-year-old with COPD presents with worsening dyspnea after starting propranolol for migraine. RR 22/min, wheeze diffuse, BP 108/70 mmHg, HR 48 bpm, SpO₂ 91% on 2 L.
stemZh: 60 歲 COPD 病人因偏頭痛開始服用 propranolol 後呼吸困難惡化。RR 22 次/分、瀰漫喘鳴、BP 108/70 mmHg、HR 48 bpm、2 L 下 SpO₂ 91%。
optionA: Increase propranolol to slow migraine triggers
optionB: Notify the provider about nonselective beta blockade worsening bronchospasm and bradycardia per GOLD drug safety considerations
optionC: Give another beta blocker for rate control
optionD: Start high-dose NSAIDs for bronchodilation
explanationZh: 依據 GOLD 藥物安全章節，非選擇性乙型阻斷劑可加重氣道收縮與緩脈。正解通報醫師調整偏頭痛用藥並評估氣道處置。選項A加量惡化喘鳴。選項C同類錯誤。選項D NSAID 無支氣管擴張作用且具腎與出血風險。

A.en: Escalating nonselective beta blockade deepens bronchoconstriction in reactive airways.
A.zh: 非選擇性乙型阻斷劑加量會加深反應性氣道收縮。

B.en: Switching to cardioselective agents or alternative migraine prophylaxis restores safer physiology.
B.zh: 改心臟選擇性藥物或替代偏頭痛預防可恢復較安全生理。

C.en: Additional beta blockers compound bradycardia without reversing obstruction.
C.zh: 再加乙型阻斷劑加重緩脈且無法解除阻塞。

D.en: NSAIDs do not relax smooth muscle and may complicate comorbid renal disease.
D.zh: NSAID 不鬆弛平滑肌，也可能使共病腎病複雜化。

usTwDifference: 台灣門診常忽略 COPD 病人非選擇性乙型阻斷劑風險；美國藥局系統較常跳出警語，護理通報原則相同。

stem: A 22-year-old with anorexia BMI 15 has refeeding syndrome day 3: phosphate 1.6 mg/dL, glucose 94 mg/dL, peripheral edema, RR 20/min, BP 100/60 mmHg, ECG QTc 510 ms.
stemZh: 22 歲厭食症 BMI 15，再餵食第三天，phosphate 1.6 mg/dL、血糖 94 mg/dL、周邊水腫、RR 20 次/分、BP 100/60 mmHg、心電圖 QTc 510 ms。
optionA: Double the feeding rate to fix edema
optionB: Notify the team about hypophosphatemia-driven cardiac risk and anticipate phosphate replacement per ASPEN refeeding consensus
optionC: Give furosemide alone without labs
optionD: Ignore QTc because glucose is normal
explanationZh: 依據 ASPEN 再餵食症候群共識，低磷可致心律不整與呼吸衰竭風險。正解通報並依醫囑補磷與調整熱量增速。選項A加速餵食惡化轉移性消耗。選項C單純利尿未處理電解質。選項D忽略延長 QT 與低磷關聯。

A.en: Accelerating calories worsens intracellular phosphate shifts during refeeding.
A.zh: 再餵食期加速熱量會惡化磷進入細胞的轉移。

B.en: IV or oral phosphate repletion stabilizes myocardium before advancing nutrition.
B.zh: 靜脈或口服補磷可在增加營養前穩定心肌。

C.en: Diuretics alone do not correct hypophosphatemia driving respiratory muscle weakness.
C.zh: 單純利尿無法矯正導致呼吸肌無力的低磷。

D.en: QT prolongation correlates with electrolyte shifts even when glucose is controlled.
D.zh: 即使血糖受控，QT 延長仍與電解質轉移相關。

usTwDifference: 台灣精神科病房對磷監測頻率不一；美國專門進食障礙中心較制式，補磷優先概念相同。

stem: A 10-year-old with nephrotic syndrome on prednisone develops severe abdominal pain, scrotal edema, absent bowel sounds, HR 132 bpm, BP 92/60 mmHg, Hgb 13 g/dL, temp 37.6°C.
stemZh: 10 歲腎病症候群病童服用 prednisone，出現嚴重腹痛、陰囊水腫、腸音消失、HR 132 bpm、BP 92/60 mmHg、血色素 13 g/dL、體溫 37.6°C。
optionA: Apply heat to the abdomen and observe
optionB: Notify pediatric surgery and nephrology about suspected peritonitis from spontaneous bacterial peritonitis physiology in nephrosis
optionC: Give high-dose opioids only at home
optionD: Increase oral salt to draw fluid out of the scrotum
explanationZh: 依據 KDIGO 腎病症候群感染併發症資料，腹水與免疫抑制使自發性腹膜炎風險上升，腸麻痺與休克前驅需外科會診。正解通報兒外科與腎科。選項A熱敷延誤手術評估。選項C居家鴉片掩蓋腹膜炎徵象。選項D高鹽惡化水腫與高血壓。

A.en: Heat does not treat bacterial peritoneal inflammation causing ileus.
A.zh: 熱敷無法治療細菌性腹膜發炎引起的腸麻痺。

B.en: Early antibiotics and possible surgical exploration align with SBP in ascitic nephrotic patients.
B.zh: 早期抗生素與可能手術探查符合腹水型腎病症候群的 SBP。

C.en: Opioids mask peritoneal signs and delay operative decisions.
C.zh: 鴉片掩蓋腹膜徵象並延誤手術決策。

D.en: Sodium loading worsens third-spacing without addressing infection.
D.zh: 鈉負荷未處理感染反而加重第三間隙積液。

usTwDifference: 台灣兒童腎病症候群腹膜炎案例少但致死率高；美國教科書警語相同，早期抗生素原則一致。

stem: A 45-year-old with acute liver failure from acetaminophen toxicity has INR 2.8, ammonia 120 µmol/L, asterixis, BP 110/68 mmHg, HR 88 bpm, temp 37.0°C, creatinine 1.1 mg/dL.
stemZh: 45 歲乙醯胺酚中毒急性肝衰竭，INR 2.8、ammonia 120 µmol/L、撲翼樣顫抖、BP 110/68 mmHg、HR 88 bpm、體溫 37.0°C、creatinine 1.1 mg/dL。
optionA: Notify hepatology/transplant center about encephalopathy progression and antidote continuation per AASLD acute liver failure management
optionB: Give sedatives routinely to calm tremor
optionC: Elevate head of bed 30° and avoid constipation triggers
optionD: Hold N-acetylcysteine once INR rises
optionE: Monitor glucose frequently because impaired gluconeogenesis risks hypoglycemia
explanationZh: 依據 AASLD 急性肝衰竭指引，腦病變惡化需轉診移植中心並維持解毒劑與支持治療。正解通知專科、頭高位減顱壓風險、頻監測血糖。選項B鎮靜掩蓋神經評估。選項D自行停 NAC 可能錯失治療窗口。

A.en: Rising ammonia with coagulopathy triggers transfer algorithms for transplant listing.
A.zh: 氨上升合併凝血異常會啟動轉院移植列冊流程。

B.en: Sedatives obscure grade progression of hepatic encephalopathy.
B.zh: 鎮靜劑遮蔽肝性腦病程度進展。

C.en: Head elevation and bowel regimens reduce intracranial hypertension triggers.
C.zh: 頭高位與腸道處置可降低顱內壓促發因子。

D.en: NAC continuation follows protocol even as labs worsen until hepatology stops it.
D.zh: NAC 是否停用由肝科依協議決定，非自行停止。

E.en: Failing liver glucose output risks sudden hypoglycemic seizures.
E.zh: 肝臟糖輸出衰竭有突發低血糖抽搐風險。

usTwDifference: 台灣肝移植等待名額有限；美國 MELD 分數即時更新，腦病變通報原則相同。

stem: A 72-year-old with pacemaker reports dizziness when turning head left; telemetry shows paced spikes without capture during neck rotation, underlying rate 38 bpm, BP 100/64 mmHg.
stemZh: 72 歲心律調節器病人向左轉頭時暈眩，遙測顯示頸部旋轉時有 pacing spike 但未奪獲，基礎心率 38 bpm、BP 100/64 mmHg。
optionA: Tell the patient to avoid pacemaker checks forever
optionB: Notify cardiology/electrophysiology about pacemaker lead malfunction with positional physiology per HRS device troubleshooting standards
optionC: Apply vigorous neck massage to reset the wire
optionD: Turn off the pacemaker magnet mode at home
explanationZh: 依據 HRS 植入裝置故障排除建議，姿勢性失去奪獲提示導線微脫位或斷裂風險。正解通知心臟電生理團隊安排裝置檢查。選項A延誤致命緩脈。選項C按摩可能惡化導線。選項D病人不應自行磁鐵操作。

A.en: Ignoring capture loss risks syncope from untreated bradycardia.
A.zh: 忽略奪獲失敗可能因未治療緩脈而昏厥。

B.en: Device interrogation identifies lead impedance changes during positional maneuvers.
B.zh: 裝置詢問可在姿勢動作下辨識導線阻抗變化。

C.en: Neck manipulation may fracture leads or worsen insulation breaks.
C.zh: 頸部操作可能折斷導線或惡化絕緣破損。

D.en: Patient magnet interactions require clinician supervision to avoid asynchronous pacing hazards.
D.zh: 磁鐵互動需臨床監督，避免非同步 pacing 危害。

usTwDifference: 台灣裝置廠商到院詢問速度不一；美國門診 device clinic 較密集，姿勢性失奪獲通報原則相同。

stem: A 28-year-old with pelvic fracture after MVC has scrotal hematoma, BP 90/58 mmHg, HR 128 bpm, Hgb 9.4 g/dL from 12 two hours ago, FAST negative, lactate 3.1 mmol/L.
stemZh: 28 歲摩托車禍後骨盆骨折病人陰囊血腫，BP 90/58 mmHg、HR 128 bpm、血色素兩小時前 12 現為 9.4 g/dL、FAST 陰性、lactate 3.1 mmol/L。
optionA: Discharge because FAST is negative
optionB: Escalate trauma surgery evaluation for retroperitoneal hemorrhage physiology despite negative FAST per EAST pelvic fracture bleeding pathways
optionC: Apply ice only and observe overnight without labs
optionD: Start therapeutic anticoagulation for DVT prophylaxis immediately at full dose
explanationZh: 依據 EAST 骨盆骨折出血管理路徑，FAST 陰性無法排除後腹腔大失血。正解升級創傷外科評估血管栓塞或填塞。選項A出院可能休克。選項C忽略血色素下降。選項D未穩定前全劑量抗凝禁忌。

A.en: Negative FAST does not rule out retroperitoneal venous plexus bleeding.
A.zh: FAST 陰性無法排除後腹腔靜脈叢出血。

B.en: Angiography or preperitoneal packing addresses hemodynamic instability with pelvic ring disruption.
B.zh: 血管攝影或腹膜前填塞可處理骨盆環破壞的血流動力學不穩。

C.en: Ice packs do not replace transfusion or embolization when hemoglobin falls 2.6 g/dL in two hours.
C.zh: 兩小時降血色素 2.6 g/dL 時冰敷無法取代輸血或栓塞。

D.en: Full anticoagulation during active retroperitoneal bleed worsens hemorrhagic shock.
D.zh: 活動性後腹腔出血期全劑量抗凝會惡化出血性休克。

usTwDifference: 台灣創傷中心對骨盆栓塞可及性不一；美國 MTP 與骨盆綁帶教育較普及，升級通報原則相同。

stem: A 62-year-old with a right pleural effusion undergoes thoracentesis; 1.2 L removed. Ten minutes later the patient coughs frothy pink sputum, SpO₂ 85% on 4 L, BP 168/96 mmHg, HR 110 bpm, bilateral crackles new.
stemZh: 62 歲右側肋膜積液病人接受胸腔穿刺，抽出 1.2 L。10 分鐘後咳粉紅泡沫痰、4 L 氧氣下 SpO₂ 85%、BP 168/96 mmHg、HR 110 bpm、雙側新發囉音。
optionA: Remove another liter immediately at the bedside
optionB: Stop further drainage, provide supplemental oxygen, notify pulmonology about re-expansion pulmonary edema physiology per ACCP thoracentesis guidance
optionC: Give a rapid fluid bolus to raise SpO₂
optionD: Lay flat to improve perfusion
explanationZh: 依據 ACCP 胸腔穿刺合併症資料，大量快速復張可誘發肺水腫樣低氧。正解停止引流、給氧並通知胸腔科評估支持治療。選項A再抽液惡化通透性肺傷。選項C容積負荷可能加重肺水腫。選項D平躺增加回流使症狀惡化。

A.en: Continuing drainage after frothy sputum risks worsening alveolar-capillary leak.
A.zh: 粉紅泡沫痰後再抽液會惡化肺泡微血管渗漏。

B.en: Oxygen and diuretics or positive pressure may be ordered after re-expansion injury recognition.
B.zh: 辨識復張性肺水腫後可醫囑氧氣、利尿或陽壓換氣。

C.en: Fluid boluses increase hydrostatic pressure when capillary leak is already present.
C.zh: 已有微血管渗漏時輸液會提高靜水壓。

D.en: Supine positioning augments venous return to an injured lung.
D.zh: 平躺增加回流至受傷肺臟。

usTwDifference: 台灣胸腔穿刺常在超音波導引下執行；美國門診抽液量限制指引類似，復張性肺水腫辨識原則相同。

stem: A 40-year-old with meningococcemia develops purpura, temp 39.6°C, BP 78/48 mmHg, HR 142 bpm, lactate 5.4 mmol/L, WBC 3.2 ×10³/µL, platelets 84 ×10³/µL.
stemZh: 40 歲腦膜炎球菌敗血症病人出現紫斑、體溫 39.6°C、BP 78/48 mmHg、HR 142 bpm、lactate 5.4 mmol/L、WBC 3.2 ×10³/µL、血小板 84 ×10³/µL。
optionA: Activate sepsis protocol with rapid blood cultures before antibiotics if policy allows minimal delay
optionB: Delay antibiotics until MRI confirms meningitis
optionC: Give 30 mL/kg crystalloid bolus early if no pulmonary edema contraindication
optionD: Apply ice packs to petechiae only as primary treatment
optionE: Notify infection control for droplet precautions and public health notification considerations
explanationZh: 依據 SSC 敗血症一小時套組與 CDC 腦膜炎球菌指引，休克與紫斑需快速抗生素、適當輸液與感染管制。正解啟動套組、早期晶體復甦、並通知感控。選項BMRI前延遲抗生素死亡率上升。選項D冰敷無法逆轉敗血性休克。

A.en: Cultures paired with immediate empiric therapy balance diagnostics with survival in fulminant sepsis.
A.zh: 猛暴敗血症需在經驗治療同時配對培養以平衡診斷與存活。

B.en: Imaging should not postpone antibiotics when purpuric rash and shock suggest meningococcemia.
B.zh: 紫斑休克提示腦膜炎球菌血症時，影像不可拖延抗生素。

C.en: Guideline fluid boluses restore perfusion unless fluid overload signs dominate.
C.zh: 除非肺水腫徵象主導，指引性輸液可恢復灌流。

D.en: Surface cooling does not reverse DIC-related vascular leak driving hypotension.
D.zh: 體表降溫無法逆轉 DIC 相關血管渗漏造成的低血壓。

E.en: Droplet isolation and public health tracing limit institutional outbreaks.
E.zh: 飛沫隔離與公衛追蹤可限制院內群聚。

usTwDifference: 台灣抗生素取得前常需自費；美國急診一小時 bundle 執行率監測較嚴，時間敏感原則相同。

stem: A 55-year-old with acute STEMI post-PCI develops sudden hypotension, JVD 14 cm, clear lungs, muffled heart sounds, pulsus paradoxus 18 mmHg, HR 110 bpm, BP 82/60 mmHg.
stemZh: 55 歲急性 ST 段上升心肌梗塞經 PCI 後突然低血壓，JVD 14 cm、肺部清晰、心音遙遠、奇脈 18 mmHg、HR 110 bpm、BP 82/60 mmHg。
optionA: Give large diuretic dose for JVD
optionB: Activate cardiology/surgery for suspected cardiac tamponade physiology and bedside echo per AHA pericardial complications guidance
optionC: Trendelenburg only for 6 hours
optionD: Increase beta blocker for HR 110
explanationZh: 依據 AHA 心肌梗塞心包併發症建議，貝克三徵變化與奇脈提示心包填塞。正解緊急心超與心包放液或手術評估。選項A利尿劑惡化前負荷依賴的心室充填。選項C姿位無法解除積液。選項D乙型阻斷劑在填塞可惡化休克。

A.en: Diuretics reduce preload when tamponade physiology depends on adequate filling pressure.
A.zh: 填塞生理仰賴適當充盈壓時，利尿劑降低前負荷。

B.en: Echo-guided pericardiocentesis restores ventricular filling in compressive shock.
B.zh: 超音波指引心包穿刺可恢復壓迫性休克的心室充盈。

C.en: Positioning alone cannot drain pericardial blood after PCI perforation risk.
C.zh: PCI 後穿孔風險的血心包無法只靠姿位引流。

D.en: Beta blockade lowers compensatory tachycardia maintaining cardiac output in tamponade.
D.zh: 乙型阻斷降低填塞時維持心輸出的代償心搏過速。

usTwDifference: 台灣心導管室到外科開刀房動線因醫院而異；美國 hybrid room 較多，填塞通報原則相同。

stem: A 70-year-old with chronic lymphocytic leukemia develops temp 38.2°C, night sweats return, lymph nodes double in size over 2 weeks, Hgb 9.2 g/dL, platelets 90 ×10³/µL, WBC 180 ×10³/µL.
stemZh: 70 歲慢性淋巴球白血病病人發燒 38.2°C、夜汗再發，兩週內淋巴結腫大加倍，血色素 9.2 g/dL、血小板 90 ×10³/µL、白血球 180 ×10³/µL。
optionA: Ignore fever because WBC is already high
optionB: Notify hematology about Richter transformation or disease progression physiology requiring workup per iwCLL monitoring standards
optionC: Start empiric broad antibiotics for all CLC patients with fever
optionD: Apply heating pads to nodes to shrink them
explanationZh: 依據 iwCLL 疾病監測建議，快速淋巴結增大合併全身症狀需鑑別 Richter 轉化或感染。正解轉介血液科安排影像與切片或實驗室。選項A白血球高仍可能是淋巴瘤惡化。選項C未評估即抗生素可能掩蓋診斷。選項D熱敷無病理根據。

A.en: Leukocytosis does not exclude aggressive lymphoid transformation with fever.
A.zh: 白血球增高不排除合併發燒的侵襲性淋巴轉化。

B.en: Hematology orders PET-CT or biopsy when nodes rapidly enlarge with cytopenias.
B.zh: 淋巴結快速變大合併血球低下時，血液科可安排 PET-CT 或切片。

C.en: Blind antibiotics delay diagnosis of transformation or viral reactivation syndromes.
C.zh: 盲目抗生素延誤轉化或病毒再活化症候群診斷。

D.en: Heat does not treat malignant proliferation or infection-driven lymphadenopathy.
D.zh: 熱敷無法治療惡性增生或感染造成的淋巴腫大。

usTwDifference: 台灣 CLL 追蹤多在血液科門診；美國臨床試驗多，惡化通報原則相同。

stem: A 50-year-old with obstructive jaundice from pancreatic head mass has dark urine, clay stools, total bilirubin 12 mg/dL, direct 10 mg/dL, INR 1.5, platelets 140 ×10³/µL, mild itching, temp 37.4°C.
stemZh: 50 歲胰頭腫瘤阻塞性黃疸病人茶色尿、灰白色便，總膽紅素 12 mg/dL、直接 10 mg/dL、INR 1.5、血小板 140 ×10³/µL、輕癢、體溫 37.4°C。
optionA: Give vitamin K IM once and cancel surgery without recheck
optionB: Notify hepatobiliary surgery about cholestatic coagulopathy and anticipate vitamin K trials per NCCN perioperative biliary obstruction principles
optionC: Start therapeutic anticoagulation for clot prevention tonight
optionD: Recommend tanning beds to reduce bilirubin
explanationZh: 依據 NCCN 胰臟腫瘤周手術期支持原則，阻塞性黃疸可致脂溶性維生素吸收不良與凝血異常。正解通知外科並依醫囑補充維生素K與追蹤 INR。選項A單次劑量未追蹤可能仍不合手術條件。選項C未排除惡性血栓前全劑量抗凝危險。選項D紫外線無法清除胆汁郁積。

A.en: Single-dose vitamin K without INR follow-up may leave residual coagulopathy before ERCP or surgery.
A.zh: 單次維生素K未追蹤 INR，ERCP 或手術前可能仍有凝血異常。

B.en: Structured coagulation correction reduces bleeding during biliary decompression procedures.
B.zh: 系統性矯正凝血可降低膽道減壓處置出血風險。

C.en: Anticoagulation without portal vein thrombosis workup risks hemorrhage with elevated INR.
C.zh: 未評估門靜脈血栓即抗凝，在 INR 升高時出血風險大。

D.en: UV exposure does not improve conjugated hyperbilirubinemia from mechanical obstruction.
D.zh: 紫外線無法改善機械阻塞造成的結合型高膽紅素。

usTwDifference: 台灣胰頭癌手術前置 ERCP 引流爭議多；美國術前減黃策略較多臨床試驗，凝血追蹤原則相同。

stem: A 35-year-old with tetralogy of Fallot repair as a child presents with exercise cyanosis. SpO₂ 82% on room air, hemoglobin 19 g/dL, RV pressure estimated 90 mmHg on echo, HR 88 bpm, BP 118/72 mmHg.
stemZh: 35 歲法洛氏四重症術後病人運動時發紺，室氣 SpO₂ 82%、血色素 19 g/dL、超音波估計右室壓 90 mmHg、HR 88 bpm、BP 118/72 mmHg。
optionA: Recommend high-intensity sprint training to improve saturation
optionB: Refer to adult congenital cardiology for right-to-left shunt physiology reassessment per ACC ACHD guidance
optionC: Start long-term oxygen only without evaluation
optionD: Ignore elevated hemoglobin as normal for altitude
explanationZh: 依據 ACC 成人先天性心臟病指引，術後仍低氧與紅血球增多提示右向左分流或肺動脈問題復發。正解轉介 ACHD 專科影像與導管評估。選項A劇烈運動加重缺氧。選項C氧氣不能取代病因診斷。選項D血色素 19 非高原可解釋。

A.en: Sprinting increases right-to-left shunting when RV pressure is 90 mmHg.
A.zh: 右室壓 90 mmHg 時衝刺會增加右向左分流。

B.en: ACHD teams evaluate residual VSD, conduit stenosis, or arrhythmia driving cyanosis.
B.zh: ACHD 團隊評估殘餘室缺、通道狹窄或心律不整造成的發紺。

C.en: Chronic oxygen without diagnosis masks worsening pulmonary vascular disease.
C.zh: 長期氧氣未診斷會掩蓋惡化的肺血管病變。

D.en: Polycythemia at sea level signals chronic hypoxemia needing structural evaluation.
D.zh: 海平面紅血球增多提示慢性低氧需結構評估。

usTwDifference: 台灣 ACHD 專責門診仍少；美國專科中心網絡較完整，發紺通報原則相同。

stem: A 60-year-old with lumbar spinal stenosis post-laminectomy reports new urinary retention 8 hours, bladder scan 750 mL, lower extremity weakness 3/5 bilateral, saddle anesthesia, BP 138/84 mmHg.
stemZh: 60 歲腰椎狹窄椎板切除術後 8 小時新發尿潴留，膀胱超音波 750 mL、雙下肢肌力 3/5、鞍部麻木、BP 138/84 mmHg。
optionA: Encourage more oral fluids to stimulate voiding
optionB: Notify neurosurgery about cauda equina compression physiology and prepare for emergent imaging per AANS spinal emergency standards
optionC: Insert Foley without provider awareness and wait
optionD: Administer high-dose steroids only at home
explanationZh: 依據 AANS 脊髓急症評估要點，術後馬尾症候群徵象需緊急影像排除血腫或移位。正解通知神經外科安排 MRI 或再手術評估。選項A灌水惡化膀胱張力。選項C導尿可暫解張力但取代不了病因處置且需醫囑。選項D類固醇未證實且延誤手術。

A.en: Fluid loading worsens detrusor pressure when neurologic outlet obstruction is evolving.
A.zh: 神經性出口阻塞進展時，灌水會惡化逼尿肌壓力。

B.en: MRI differentiates epidural hematoma from graft displacement causing saddle anesthesia.
B.zh: MRI 可區分硬膜外血腫與植入物移位造成的鞍部麻木。

C.en: Catheterization relieves retention temporarily but does not replace surgical decompression decisions.
C.zh: 導尿暫時解除潴留，無法取代外科減壓決策。

D.en: High-dose steroids without imaging delay definitive evacuation of compressive lesions.
D.zh: 未影像即高劑量類固醇延遲清除壓迫病灶。

usTwDifference: 台灣術後 MRI 可及性因醫院而異；美國夜間神經外科值班較多，馬尾徵象通報原則相同。

stem: A 45-year-old with sarcoidosis on prednisone 20 mg daily develops polyuria, polydipsia, Na⁺ 152 mEq/L, serum osmolality 310 mOsm/kg, urine osmolality 80 mOsm/kg, glucose 110 mg/dL, K⁺ 4.0 mEq/L.
stemZh: 45 歲結節病病人每日 prednisone 20 mg，出現多尿多渴，Na⁺ 152 mEq/L、血清滲透壓 310 mOsm/kg、尿滲透壓 80 mOsm/kg、血糖 110 mg/dL、K⁺ 4.0 mEq/L。
optionA: Encourage free water restriction only without medical review
optionB: Notify endocrinology about central diabetes insipidus risk from neurosarcoid or corticosteroid interplay and anticipate desmopressin trials per ATS sarcoidosis monitoring
optionC: Give insulin infusion because glucose is 110 mg/dL
optionD: Start thiazide diuretic to raise sodium
explanationZh: 依據 ATS 結節病監測建議，高鈉血症合併稀释尿需鑑別中樞性尿崩或腎性尿崩與類固醇影響。正解通知內分泌科安排禁水試驗或激素試驗。選項A過度限水在意识障礙風險病人需醫師指導。選項C血糖非高滲主因。選項D噻嗪類通常用於低鈉而非此情境。

A.en: Aggressive water restriction without monitoring risks hypernatremic encephalopathy correction errors.
A.zh: 未監測即積極限水有校正錯誤導致腦病變風險。

B.en: Desmopressin trials differentiate nephrogenic from central DI after pituitary inflammation.
B.zh: 在腦垂體發炎後，desmopressin 試驗可區分腎性與中樞性尿崩。

C.en: Insulin therapy targets hyperglycemic osmotic diuresis, not euglycemic hypernatremia.
C.zh: 胰島素治療高血糖滲透性利尿，不適用於血糖正常的高鈉。

D.en: Thiazides are not first-line for hypernatremia with hypotonic urine from DI.
D.zh: 尿崩所致低張尿的高鈉，噻嗪並非第一線。

usTwDifference: 台灣結節病病例較少；美國胸腔科與風濕共同追蹤多，尿量異常通報原則相同。

stem: A 30-year-old with ITP on eltrombopag has sudden severe headache, BP 168/98 mmHg, platelets 180 ×10³/µL yesterday from 12 ×10³/µL three days ago, no trauma, visual scotoma.
stemZh: 30 歲免疫性血小板低下症病人服用 eltrombopag，突然嚴重頭痛、BP 168/98 mmHg，血小板昨日 180 ×10³/µL、三天前 12 ×10³/µL，無外傷、視野暗點。
optionA: Give aspirin for headache
optionB: Activate emergency neuroimaging for possible rebound hemorrhage after rapid platelet rise per ASH ITP thrombopoietin agonist safety communication
optionC: Increase eltrombopag dose to prevent migraine
optionD: Ignore symptoms because platelets are now normal
explanationZh: 依據 ASH 對 TPO 受體促效劑血小板反彈與血栓出血風險教育，急速上升後的頭痛神經症狀需排除顱內出血。正解啟動急診神經影像。選項A阿斯匹靈增加出血。選項C加劑量與評估方向相反。選項D正常數值不能排除血管事件。

A.en: Antiplatelet therapy during acute thunderclap headache risks expanding hemorrhage.
A.zh: 急性雷擊頭痛時抗血小板可能擴大出血。

B.en: CT or MRI rules out parenchymal bleed after explosive platelet recovery.
B.zh: 血小板驟升後需 CT 或 MRI 排除實質出血。

C.en: Escalating TPO agonists without evaluation worsens thrombotic risk during hypertensive surges.
C.zh: 未評估即加 TPO 促效劑，在高血壓高峰時加重血栓風險。

D.en: Normalized counts do not exclude venous sinus thrombosis or hemorrhagic conversion.
D.zh: 數值正常不能排除靜脈竇血栓或出血性轉化。

usTwDifference: 台灣 eltrombopag 費用高昂；美國藥局自動續領較多，神經警訊通報原則相同。

stem: A 8-year-old with DKA recovering on insulin infusion suddenly complains of severe abdominal pain, glucose 190 mg/dL, WBC 16 ×10³/µL, still mildly acidotic, bowel sounds decreased.
stemZh: 8 歲糖尿病酮酸中毒病童胰島素輸注恢復中突然嚴重腹痛，血糖 190 mg/dL、WBC 16 ×10³/µL、仍輕度酸中毒、腸音減弱。
optionA: Attribute pain solely to acidosis and continue only fluids
optionB: Notify pediatrics/surgery about possible acute appendicitis masked by DKA physiology per ISPAD acute complication guidance
optionC: Give high-dose opioids and send home
optionD: Stop insulin because glucose is under 200 mg/dL
explanationZh: 依據 ISPAD 急性併發症指引，DKA 改善期腹痛惡化需鑑別外科急症如闌尾炎。正解通知兒科與外科安排影像與檢驗。選項A忽略外科掩蓋現象。選項C鴉片掩蓋徵象且出院不當。選項D驟停胰島素可能反彈酮酸。

A.en: Worsening focal abdominal signs exceed typical DKA gastroparesis pain.
A.zh: 惡化性局部腹痛超越典型 DKA 胃輕癱疼痛。

B.en: Surgical consults obtain ultrasound or CT when leukocytosis and ileus emerge during recovery.
B.zh: 恢復期出現白血球升高與腸麻痺時，外科會診可安排超音波或電腦斷層。

C.en: Opioids obscure peritoneal signs in pediatric surgical emergencies.
C.zh: 鴉片掩蓋兒科外科急症的腹膜徵象。

D.en: Insulin should continue until ketosis resolves even if glucose normalizes.
D.zh: 即使血糖正常也應持續胰島素直到酮症解除。

usTwDifference: 台灣兒童 DKA 常在兒醫中心；美國急診兒科對掩蓋性闌尾炎警覺較高，通報原則相同。

stem: A 58-year-old with HF has ICD shock x3 at home, awake, BP 132/86 mmHg, HR 168 irregularly irregular, SpO₂ 94% on RA, potassium 4.0 mEq/L, INR 1.0.
stemZh: 58 歲心衰竭病人家中 ICD 電擊三次，清醒、BP 132/86 mmHg、HR 168 不規則不整、室氣 SpO₂ 94%、鉀 4.0 mEq/L、INR 1.0。
optionA: Turn off the ICD with a magnet at home repeatedly
optionB: Seek emergency care for storming arrhythmia evaluation and device interrogation per HRS ICD shock management
optionC: Take extra digoxin to slow the rate
optionD: Assume therapy is unnecessary if he remains awake after shocks
optionE: Bring the device card, avoid driving, and monitor for chest pain or syncope during transport
explanationZh: 依據 HRS 針對 ICD 放電後病人的建議，多次電擊需急診完成電解質與缺血評估並讀取裝置記錄；同時應攜帶識別卡、避免自行駕車，途中觀察胸痛或暈厥。正解涵蓋立即就醫與安全轉運準備。選項A未經指導使用磁鐵可能抑制必要治療。選項C未分型頻脈下自行加毛地黃具致命風險。選項D清醒不代表沒有持續心室頻脈或電池/導線問題。

A.en: Patient-applied magnet therapy without electrophysiology guidance risks disabling life-saving shocks.
A.zh: 未經電生理指導自行用磁鐵可能關閉救命電擊。

B.en: Emergency evaluation captures intracardiac electrograms and treats triggers like AF with RVR.
B.zh: 急診評估可取得心內電圖並處理心房顫動併快速心室反應等誘因。

C.en: Digoxin in wide-complex undifferentiated tachycardia risks lethal acceleration.
C.zh: 寬 QRS 未分型頻脈使用毛地黃可能致命加速。

D.en: Alert mentation does not prove arrhythmia termination or rule out lead fracture with inappropriate shocks.
D.zh: 意識清醒無法證明心律已終止，也不能排除導線問題造成不適當電擊。

E.en: Device identification and observer transport protect against recurrent syncope while arranging interrogation.
E.zh: 攜帶裝置資料並由他人陪同可降低再次暈厥風險，利於安排裝置詢問。

usTwDifference: 台灣 ICD 遠距傳輸普及度上升；美國 device clinic 連線較成熟，多次電擊就醫原則相同。

stem: A 40-year-old with HIV CD4 120 presents with dysphagia, white plaques on tongue, weight loss 6 kg, oral pain, temp 37.8°C, thrush unresponsive to nystatin one week.
stemZh: 40 歲 HIV 病人 CD4 120，吞嚥困難、舌面白色斑塊、體重下降 6 kg、口腔疼痛、體溫 37.8°C，使用 nystatin 一週仍鵝口瘡。
optionA: Double nystatin swish time only
optionB: Escalate to infectious disease for esophageal candidiasis physiology and systemic antifungal planning per IDSA HIV opportunistic infection guidelines
optionC: Recommend spicy foods to clear plaques
optionD: Stop all antiretrovirals to focus on mouth rinse
explanationZh: 依據 IDSA HIV 伺機性感染指引，低 CD4 合併吞嚥困難與治療失敗口腔病灶需假設食道念珠菌感染。正解轉介感染科安排全身性抗黴菌與內視鏡評估。選項A局部藥對深部感染不足。選項C刺激黏膜。選項D停 ART 使免疫更差。

A.en: Topical polyenes fail when invasive esophageal involvement causes dysphagia.
A.zh: 侵犯食道造成吞嚥困難時，局部多烯類失效。

B.en: Systemic azoles or echinocandins treat esophageal mucosal invasion in advanced immunosuppression.
B.zh: 全身性azole 或棘白菌素可治療重度免疫抑制下的食道黏膜侵犯。

C.en: Irritant foods worsen mucosal ulceration in candidal esophagitis.
C.zh: 刺激性食物惡化念珠菌食道炎的黏膜潰瘍。

D.en: Stopping ART deepens immunosuppression and fungal burden.
D.zh: 停 ART 加深免疫抑制與黴菌負荷。

usTwDifference: 台灣公費抗黴菌升級需事前審；美國門診處方較快，吞嚥困難升級原則相同。

stem: A 72-year-old with aortic graft 5 years ago develops painful purple toes, livedo reticularis, eosinophils 1.8 ×10³/µL, creatinine 2.1 mg/dL from 1.0, new hypertension 168/98 mmHg.
stemZh: 72 歲病人五年前主動脈人工血管，出現疼痛性紫趾、網狀青斑、嗜酸性球 1.8 ×10³/µL、creatinine 由 1.0 升至 2.1 mg/dL、新發高血壓 168/98 mmHg。
optionA: Apply warm socks only
optionB: Notify vascular surgery and nephrology about atheroembolic shower physiology after graft manipulation or imaging per ACC peripheral vascular complication education
optionC: Start high-dose steroids empirically without workup
optionD: Increase NSAIDs for toe pain
explanationZh: 依據 ACC 周邊血管介入併發症衛教，紫趾、網狀斑與嗜酸性球上升合併腎功能惡化符合膽固醇栓塞生理。正解通知血管外科與腎科評估來源與支持治療。選項A保暖無法清除栓子。選項C類固醇未證實且需排除感染。選項D NSAID 惡化腎功能。

A.en: Heat does not dissolve cholesterol microemboli lodged in digital arterioles.
A.zh: 熱無法溶解卡在指動脈的微膽固醇栓子。

B.en: Multidisciplinary review identifies iatrogenic catheter or surgical triggers and plans dialysis readiness.
B.zh: 跨科檢討可找出醫源性導管或手術誘因並規劃透析準備。

C.en: Steroids without biopsy confirmation may harm if infection mimics eosinophilia.
C.zh: 未切片證實即類固醇，若感染模仿嗜酸性球升高可能有害。

D.en: NSAIDs worsen renal perfusion when cholesterol emboli already compromise arcuate arteries.
D.zh: 膽固醇栓塞已影響弓狀動脈時，NSAID 惡化腎灌流。

usTwDifference: 台灣血管外科追蹤人工血管以超音波為主；美國抗血小板策略討論多，栓塞通報原則相同。

stem: A 50-year-old with obstructive hydrocephalus EVD day 2 has ICP 24 mmHg, CSF output 5 mL/hour, sudden pinpoint pupils, BP 168/92 mmHg, HR 52 bpm, sluggish corneals.
stemZh: 50 歲阻塞性水腦症病人術後第二天腦室外引流，ICP 24 mmHg、腦脊髓液流速 5 mL/hour，突然針尖樣瞳孔、BP 168/92 mmHg、HR 52 bpm、角膜反射遲鈍。
optionA: Lower the EVD drain height to drain faster without orders
optionB: Notify neurosurgery about herniation physiology and anticipate emergent imaging or EVD adjustment per Neurocritical Care Society EVD management
optionC: Give mannitol 25 g IV push without airway protection assessment
optionD: Sit patient upright to 90° immediately
explanationZh: 依據 Neurocritical Care Society 腦室外引流管理建議，突然針尖瞳孔合併 Cushing 表現屬腦疝。正解通知神經外科調整引流或手術減壓與影像。選項A自行調高度可能過度引流或不足。選項C未評估气道與滲透壓即給藥有風險。選項D直立改變顱壓動態需醫囑。

A.en: Unauthorized EVD height changes alter pressure gradients unpredictably during herniation.
A.zh: 腦疝時擅自調整 EVD 高度會不可預測改變壓力梯度。

B.en: Surgical teams may emergently revise drain level, bolt ICP, or decompress ventricles.
B.zh: 外科可緊急調整引流高度、顱內壓螺栓或減壓腦室。

C.en: Osmotic therapy requires airway and sodium monitoring during rapid pushes.
C.zh: 滲透壓治療在快速推注時需气道與鈉監測。

D.en: Acute upright positioning without guidance may alter venous return during unstable ICP.
D.zh: 顱壓不穩時未指引即直立可改變靜脈回流。

usTwDifference: 台灣神外術後 EVD 護理訓練逐漸標準化；美國神經加護單位密度高，腦疝通報原則相同。

stem: A 28-year-old with ECT today received succinylcholine; now masseter spasm, temp 38.2°C rising, EtCO₂ climbing, HR 118 bpm, rigidity generalized, creatinine kinase pending.
stemZh: 28 歲病人今日接受電痙攣治療並使用 succinylcholine，現咬肌痙攣、體溫 38.2°C 上升、EtCO₂ 攀升、HR 118 bpm、全身僵硬，肌酸激酶待報。
optionA: Give another dose of succinylcholine to relax muscles
optionB: Call code for malignant hyperthermia suspicion after triggering agents per MHAUS acute crisis protocol
optionC: Wrap in blankets to conserve heat
optionD: Discharge to outpatient follow-up next week
explanationZh: 依據 MHAUS 惡性高熱急救流程，琥珀醯膽鹼後咬肌僵硬合併二氧化碳與體溫上升屬危機。正解啟動急救、停觸發藥、準備 dantrolene 醫囑與降溫。選項A再加觸發藥致命。選項C保温惡化高熱。選項D延誤救治。

A.en: Repeat depolarizing agents fuel uncontrolled calcium release in susceptible RyR1 channels.
A.zh: 易感 RyR1 通道下，重複去極化藥物助长不受控鈣釋放。

B.en: Crisis teams dantrolene, hyperventilate, and cool while monitoring CK and renal injury.
B.zh: 急救團隊給 dantrolene、加強換氣與降溫並監測 CK 與腎傷害。

C.en: Insulating blankets trap heat when metabolic rate is exploding.
C.zh: 代謝率暴增時保温毯會困住熱。

D.en: Ambulatory follow-up is unsafe when hypermetabolic crisis is evolving intra-procedure.
D.zh: 處置中出現高代謝危象時門診追蹤不安全。

usTwDifference: 台灣 dantrolene 存量因醫院而異；美國 MH 通報系統較成熟，急救啟動原則相同。
